§xONLY FOR ADVANCED USERS!

Allows you to manually set the
position of the element.

Advanced positions support placeholders,
so you can calculate positions
by using the Calculator placeholder,
get positions of other elements
and much more.

Many useful placeholders for element
positioning can be found
in the "GUI" and "Advanced"
placeholder categories.

§xYou will not be able to resize or
§xdrag and move the element while this
§xfeature is in use.

§x仅适用于高级用户！

允许您手动设置元素坐标。

器占位符计算位置，或获取其他元素位置等。

许多有用的元素坐标占位符可以在“GUI”和
“高级”占位符类别中找到。

§x使用此功能时，您将无法调整元素尺寸或拖
§x动元素。

§xONLY FOR ADVANCED USERS!

Allows you to manually set the

key:
Maximum number of commands sent per game tick,

languages.English:
Fired when the enchantment level is set for each of the three potential enchantments in the enchanting table. The level is set to the vanilla value and can be modified by this event handler. 
The enchantRow is used to determine which enchantment level is being set, 1, 2, or 3. 
The power is a number from 0-15 and indicates how many bookshelves surround the enchanting table. 
The itemStack representing the item being enchanted is also available.
languages.简体中文:
Fired when the enchantment level is set for each of the three potential enchantments in the enchanting table. The level is set to the vanilla value and can be modified by this event handler. 
The enchantRow is used to determine which enchantment level is being set, 1, 2, or 3. 
The power is a number from 0-15 and indicates how many bookshelves surround the enchanting table. 
The itemStack representing the item being enchanted is also available.
languages.繁體中文:
Fired when the enchantment level is set for each of the three potential enchantments in the enchanting table. The level is set to the vanilla value and can be modified by this event handler. 
The enchantRow is used to determine which enchantment level is being set, 1, 2, or 3. 
The power is a number from 0-15 and indicates how many bookshelves surround the enchanting table. 
The itemStack representing the item being enchanted is also available.

languages.English: All versions. If REI or JEI are installed, construction of the vanilla search trees for creative searching is disabled, and searching is instead done using these mods' search implementations. This saves several seconds during world loading, and probably also saves some RAM as well (although I have not measured).
languages.简体中文: 全版本共有。原版会构造用于创造模式搜索功能的搜索树，如果安装了REI或者JEI，将禁用原版构造，用这两种模组中的搜索实现取而代之。这在加载世界时会节省几秒钟，并且可能（虽然我没有测试）会减少一点内存占用。
languages.繁體中文: 所有版本。如果安裝了 REI 或 JEI，則停用用於創造性搜尋的原生搜尋樹的構建，而改為使用這些模組的搜尋實現。這在世界載入期間節省幾秒，可能還減少一些記憶體使用量(雖然我沒有測試)。

languages.English:
This source type lets you use web resources via URL.
Resource URLs should ALWAYS be DIRECT URLs,
which means they should point directly to the
resource and end with the resource's name + extension.
URLs also need to start with http:// or https://.

§xUsing non-direct URLs will hurt the performance!
languages.简体中文:
这种源类型允许您通过URL使用在线资源。
资源URL应始终是直接URL，这意味着它们应直接指向资
源，并以资源名称+扩展名结尾。
且URL需要以http://或https://开头。

§x使用非直接URL会有损性能！
languages.繁體中文:
This source type lets you use web resources via URL.
Resource URLs should ALWAYS be DIRECT URLs,
which means they should point directly to the
resource and end with the resource's name + extension.
URLs also need to start with http:// or https://.

§xUsing non-direct URLs will hurt the performance!

languages.English: If enabled, a more compact vertex format will be used for rendering chunks. This can reduce graphics memory usage and bandwidth requirements significantly, especially for integrated graphics cards, but can cause z-fighting with some resource packs due to how it reduces the precision of position and texture coordinate attributes. Disabling this has no effect if Oculus is installed.
languages.简体中文: 启用后，游戏将使用更紧凑的顶点格式来渲染区块。这可以显著减少显存使用和带宽需求，尤其是对于集成显卡而言。但是，由于它降低了位置和纹理坐标属性的精度，可能会导致一些资源包出现深度冲突（z-fighting）的问题。
languages.繁體中文: If enabled, a more compact vertex format will be used for rendering chunks. This can reduce graphics memory usage and bandwidth requirements significantly, especially for integrated graphics cards, but can cause z-fighting with some resource packs due to how it reduces the precision of position and texture coordinate attributes. Disabling this has no effect if Oculus is installed.

languages.English:
Reads text from a local file or remote URL and returns it.
Supports reading entire content or only the last few lines.
Content is cached to improve performance:
- Local files: Re-read every 1 second
- URLs: Re-read every 10 seconds

Required values:
- path_or_url: The file path or URL to read from
  Local files: Use relative paths (e.g. 'config/myfile.txt')
  Remote files: Use HTTP/HTTPS URLs (e.g. 'https://example.com/data.txt')

Optional values:
- mode: How to read the content (default: 'all')
  Options: 'all' (entire content), 'last' (last X lines)
- separator: Text between lines when joining (default: '\n')
  Common options: '\n' (newline), ' | ', ', ', ' '
- last_lines: Number of lines to return in 'last' mode (default: 1)
  Only used when mode is 'last'

Note: When mode is 'last' with last_lines set to 1,
the single line is returned without any separator.

Returns empty string if source is not cached yet, doesn't exist,
cannot be read, or if there's no internet connection for URLs.

Scale of waypoints in world. Use this to change the scale of all waypoints in world, including those that are near you. Use the "Clamp Depth" setting to specifically affect the size of waypoints that are far away. 
 
 Default values in older mod versions: 
 Clamp Depth: 12 
 In-World Scale: 2.5 
 Name Text Scale: 0.5 
 Distance Text Scale: 0.8

 旧版本模组中的默认值： 
 深度限制：12

languages.English:
Custom GUIs are entirely self-made
menus, which allows you to add new
screens to the game without the need
to customize an existing one.
You can open custom GUIs by simply
using the action to open GUIs.

§xIt is also possible to override
§xexisting Vanilla/Mod screens with
§xcustom GUIs, but this is not
§xrecommended and should only be
§xused if it is not possible to edit
§xthe GUI with a normal layout.
languages.简体中文:
自定义GUI完全是自制菜单，允许您向
游戏添加新幕布，而无需自定义现有幕
布。
您只需通过操作就能打开自定义幕布。

§x您也可以使用自定义GUI来覆盖现有原
§x版/模组幕布。除非仅通过普通布局无
§x法编辑GUI，否则不建议这么做。
languages.繁體中文:
Custom GUIs are entirely self-made
menus, which allows you to add new
screens to the game without the need
to customize an existing one.
You can open custom GUIs by simply
using the action to open GUIs.

§xIt is also possible to override
§xexisting Vanilla/Mod screens with
§xcustom GUIs, but this is not
§xrecommended and should only be
§xused if it is not possible to edit
§xthe GUI with a normal layout.

languages.English:
Add a new requirement group.

Requirement groups can hold multiple
requirements and basically
make them one big requirement.

Requirement groups have two modes.
In §zAND §rmode, all requirements need
to return TRUE (which means "Yes, load!"),
but in §zOR §rmode, only one requirement
needs to return TRUE.
languages.简体中文:
添加新条件组。

条件组可包含多个条件。

条件组具有两种模式。
§z“与”§r模式下所有条件为真时返回真。
§z“或”§r模式下至少1个条件为真时返回真。
languages.繁體中文:
Add a new requirement group.

Requirement groups can hold multiple
requirements and basically
make them one big requirement.

Requirement groups have two modes.
In §zAND §rmode, all requirements need
to return TRUE (which means "Yes, load!"),
but in §zOR §rmode, only one requirement
needs to return TRUE.

languages.English:
This allows you to set custom NBT data to the item.
It is basically the part the /give command that follows
after the item name in curly brackets {}.

§lFull example command:
/give @a netherite_sword{display:{Name:'["",{"text":"Kinabra","italic":false}]'}}

§lSet this as value for NBT:
{display:{Name:'["",{"text":"Kinabra","italic":false}]'}}

There are lots of Give Command Generators available online,
so just ask Google about it and you will find something.
languages.简体中文:
允许你为物品设置自定义 NBT 数据。
它相当于 /give 指令中
物品名称后花括号 {} 里的部分。

例如：
/give @a netherite_sword{display:{Name:'["",{"text":"Kinabra","italic":false}]'}}

NBT 设置值：
{display:{Name:'["",{"text":"Kinabra","italic":false}]'}}

你可以在网上找到许多“Give 指令生成器”，
只需在搜索引擎中查找即可。
languages.繁體中文:
This allows you to set custom NBT data to the item.
It is basically the part the /give command that follows
after the item name in curly brackets {}.

§lFull example command:
/give @a netherite_sword{display:{Name:'["",{"text":"Kinabra","italic":false}]'}}

§lSet this as value for NBT:
{display:{Name:'["",{"text":"Kinabra","italic":false}]'}}

There are lots of Give Command Generators available online,
so just ask Google about it and you will find something.

languages.简体中文:
需要用何种方法尝试恢复方块NBT数据? 
- Place & Data Modify，会把带NBT的方块放在玩家附近后 
  用data modify指令转换这些用setblock放的方块 
- Place & Clone，会尝试放置带NBT方块在玩家附近然后 
  用clone指令复制到最终位置 
- Teleport & Place，会尝试tp到附近位置然后直接在 
  正确的位置放下带NBT方块 
请注意Teleport & Place方法现在不太好用甚至完全用不了。 
建议的方法是Place & Data Modify，然而要让这种方法生效 
得降低粘贴命令限制到 1/tick 并将粘贴间隔增加到  
1-4 个tick或者调别的什么东西 
因此你只应当用这种方法粘贴需要迁移数据的重要方块。 
例如，做了包含库存内容的原理图， 
然后在替换规则被设置为None的时候粘贴原理图。

key:
Whether or not the NBT data of blocks is attempted to be restored,
and which method is used for that.
- Place & Data Modify will try to place the "NBT-picked" block
  near the player, and then use the data modify
  command to transfer the NBT data to the setblock'ed block
- Place & Clone will try to place the "NBT-picked" block
  near the player, and then clone it to the final location.
- Teleport & Place will try to teleport the player nearby and then
  directly place the NBT-picked item in the correct position.
Note that the teleport & place method doesn't currently work correctly/at all.
The recommended method is §ePlace & Data Modify§r, however for that to work
you will probably need to lower the pasteCommandLimit to 1 per tick and increase
the pasteCommandInterval to 1-4 ticks or something.
Thus you should only use this for pasting important blocks that need the data,
for example by making a schematic of just the inventories,
and then paste that with replace behavior set to None.

Auto-sizing will try to adjust the element's size

languages.English:
Gets the MOTD of a server.
Just replace 'someserver.com:25565'
with the actual server IP
and '1' with the MOTD line.
MOTDs only have 2 lines, so
the only valid line values are
'1' and '2'.

获取服务器的MOTD。
仅需将“someserver.com:25565”替换为
实际服务器IP，将“1”替换为MOTD行即

有效值。
languages.繁體中文:
Gets the MOTD of a server.
Just replace 'someserver.com:25565'
with the actual server IP
and '1' with the MOTD line.
MOTDs only have 2 lines, so
the only valid line values are
'1' and '2'.

languages.繁體中文: I care about your feedback and ideas! You can send me comments however you like.

languages.English: Some rooms have treasure chests that only appear if you are lucky. These chests can draw from any loot table!

languages.繁體中文: Some rooms have treasure chests that only appear if you are lucky. These chests can draw from any loot table!

languages.English: Using a blank map inside a dungeon will reveal the map of that dungeon!
languages.简体中文: 您可以在地牢内使用空地图来显示该地牢的地图！
languages.繁體中文: Using a blank map inside a dungeon will reveal the map of that dungeon!

languages.English: These dungeons are an excellent source of enchanted books.
languages.简体中文: 这些地牢是附魔书籍的绝佳来源。
languages.繁體中文: These dungeons are an excellent source of enchanted books.

languages.English: If you find another portal then you are very lucky! Be sure to take the rare key that is inside the keyhole.
languages.简体中文: 如果您找到另一个地牢传送门框架，恭喜您非常幸运！ 一定要记得带走钥匙孔内的稀有钥匙。
languages.繁體中文: If you find another portal then you are very lucky! Be sure to take the rare key that is inside the keyhole.

languages.English: Some chests contain more dungeon keys. So you can keep dungeoneering!
languages.简体中文: 箱子里可能会有更多的地牢钥匙。 能让你不断深入地牢！
languages.繁體中文: Some chests contain more dungeon keys. So you can keep dungeoneering!

languages.English: Consider bringing a few ender pearls with you. They can save you in trap rooms.

languages.繁體中文: Consider bringing a few ender pearls with you. They can save you in trap rooms.

languages.English:
The cave mode type to use when cave mode is enabled. 
 
 OFF - display above ground even when cave mode is automatically or manually enabled (same as old world map versions without cave mode) 
 Layered - separate cave maps into multiple layers depending on the used top Y 
 Full - ignore the used top Y, use a single layer for cave maps and map everything from the world top to the world bottom
languages.简体中文:
The cave mode type to use when cave mode is enabled. 
 
 OFF - display above ground even when cave mode is automatically or manually enabled (same as old world map versions without cave mode) 
 Layered - separate cave maps into multiple layers depending on the used top Y 
 Full - ignore the used top Y, use a single layer for cave maps and map everything from the world top to the world bottom
languages.繁體中文:
The cave mode type to use when cave mode is enabled. 
 
 OFF - display above ground even when cave mode is automatically or manually enabled (same as old world map versions without cave mode) 
 Layered - separate cave maps into multiple layers depending on the used top Y 
 Full - ignore the used top Y, use a single layer for cave maps and map everything from the world top to the world bottom

languages.English:
Toggles villager trading enhancements.

This allows you to bookmark one or more type of trades.
And do all possible trades for these types
with a single click.

There are 2 types of bookmarks Global and Local.
 - Global select the trade type for all villagers with the same profession.
 - Local select the trade for the active villager only.

Bookmarks also work for Wandering Traders but they only have Global type.
languages.简体中文:
切换村民交易增强功能。

这允许你收藏一个或多个交易类型。
并通过单击一次执行这些类型的所有可能交易。

有两种类型的收藏：全局（Global）和本地（Local）。
 - 全局选择相同职业的所有村民的交易类型。
 - 本地选择仅对活动村民的交易。

收藏也适用于流浪商人，但它们只有全局类型。
languages.繁體中文:
開關村民交易增強功能。

這允許您對一個或多個交易類型進行書籤標記，
並透過點一下執行所有可用的交易。

書籤有兩種類型：全域和本地。
- 全域類型適用於所有具有相同職業的村民。
- 本地類型僅適用於當前選中的村民。

書籤功能同樣適用於流浪商人，但僅有全域類型可用。

languages.English: Controls how much the Darkness effect pulses when a Warden or Sculk Shrieker gives it to you.

languages.繁體中文: 控制你會受到多少伏守者與伏聆嘯口造成的黑暗效果脈動。

languages.简体中文:
这将使得简单放置模式放置你首先看到的方块
而不是最远的方块，设置为关闭将可以放置多层
因为是由远到近放置。

key:
This causes the Easy Place mode to place the first/closest block
you are looking at first, instead of the furthest/bottom-most block.
Setting this to false allows you to place multiple layers "at once",
since the furthest blocks would be placed before the closer ones block the line of sight.

languages.English:
LivingHurtEvent is fired when an Entity is set to be hurt. 
This event is fired whenever an Entity is hurt in LivingEntity#actuallyHurt(DamageSource, float) and Player#actuallyHurt(DamageSource, float). 
This event is fired via the ForgeHooks.onLivingHurt(LivingEntity, DamageSource, float).source contains the DamageSource that caused this Entity to be hurt.amount contains the amount of damage dealt to the Entity that was hurt. 
This event is Cancelable. If this event is canceled, the Entity is not hurt.  This event does not have a result net.minecraftforge.eventbus.api.Event.HasResult 
This event is fired on the MinecraftForge.EVENT_BUS.
languages.简体中文:
LivingHurtEvent is fired when an Entity is set to be hurt. 
This event is fired whenever an Entity is hurt in LivingEntity#actuallyHurt(DamageSource, float) and Player#actuallyHurt(DamageSource, float). 
This event is fired via the ForgeHooks.onLivingHurt(LivingEntity, DamageSource, float).source contains the DamageSource that caused this Entity to be hurt.amount contains the amount of damage dealt to the Entity that was hurt. 
This event is Cancelable. If this event is canceled, the Entity is not hurt.  This event does not have a result net.minecraftforge.eventbus.api.Event.HasResult 
This event is fired on the MinecraftForge.EVENT_BUS.
languages.繁體中文:
LivingHurtEvent is fired when an Entity is set to be hurt. 
This event is fired whenever an Entity is hurt in LivingEntity#actuallyHurt(DamageSource, float) and Player#actuallyHurt(DamageSource, float). 
This event is fired via the ForgeHooks.onLivingHurt(LivingEntity, DamageSource, float).source contains the DamageSource that caused this Entity to be hurt.amount contains the amount of damage dealt to the Entity that was hurt. 
This event is Cancelable. If this event is canceled, the Entity is not hurt.  This event does not have a result net.minecraftforge.eventbus.api.Event.HasResult 
This event is fired on the MinecraftForge.EVENT_BUS.

languages.English: Connect/disconnect selected sub-world to/from the current auto one. Connect only sub-worlds that are from the same sub-server/world save. For example, if a vanilla Nether portal takes you from sub-world A to sub-world B, then you can safely connect them. Other sub-worlds connected to the current one are always at the top of the list and are marked by an asterisk (symbol: *).
languages.简体中文: 连接/断开连接选择的子世界与当前auto世界。仅连接来自同一子服务器/世界存档的子世界。例如，如果一个普通的下界传送门将你从子世界 A 带到子世界 B，那么你可以安全地连接它们。连接到当前子世界的其他子世界始终位于列表顶部，并用星号（符号：*）标记。
languages.繁體中文: Connect/disconnect selected sub-world to/from the current auto one. Connect only sub-worlds that are from the same sub-server/world save. For example, if a vanilla Nether portal takes you from sub-world A to sub-world B, then you can safely connect them. Other sub-worlds connected to the current one are always at the top of the list and are marked by an asterisk (symbol: *).

如果启用，保存的档案中将会包含自定义物品名称。
一般情况下不推荐使用，但在一些情况下(档案中有不同的背包或其他类型的存储空间)，它能发挥作用。
对于普通的装备来说，通过附魔进行匹配是最好的方法。

對於普通的裝備來說，透過附魔進行配對是最好的方法。

languages.English:
When enabled, Vanilla 3-pass box blur will be replaced with Modern UI Gaussian blur, which will give you better blur quality and rendering performance.
Modern UI has lower CPU and GPU usage to achieve similar blur strength as Vanilla at the same frame rate, it's recommended that you enable this option.
languages.简体中文:
启用后，原版的3次方盒模糊将被替换为 Modern UI 的高斯模糊, 提供更高的模糊质量和渲染性能。
Modern UI 在以相同帧率下拥有更低的CPU和GPU使用率来获得与原版相近的模糊程度，因此推荐启用该选项。
languages.繁體中文:
When enabled, Vanilla 3-pass box blur will be replaced with Modern UI Gaussian blur, which will give you better blur quality and rendering performance.
Modern UI has lower CPU and GPU usage to achieve similar blur strength as Vanilla at the same frame rate, it's recommended that you enable this option.

languages.English:
Returns either the current play time of an Audio element
(MM:SS format) or the play progress percentage (0-100).
Returns '00:00' or '0' if no audio is playing.

Required values:
- element_identifier: The ID of the audio element
- show_percentage: Set to 'true' to show percentage instead of time
languages.简体中文:
返回音频元素当前播放时间（格式 MM:SS），
或播放进度百分比（0-100）。
如果没有音轨播放，则返回“00:00”或“0”。

必填值：
- element_identifier：音频元素的 ID
- show_percentage：设为“true”以显示百分比，而不是时间
languages.繁體中文:
Returns either the current play time of an Audio element
(MM:SS format) or the play progress percentage (0-100).
Returns '00:00' or '0' if no audio is playing.

Required values:
- element_identifier: The ID of the audio element
- show_percentage: Set to 'true' to show percentage instead of time

languages.English:
Returns either the current play time of a Video menu background
(MM:SS format) or the play progress percentage (0-100).
Returns '00:00' or '0' if the element is not ready yet or no video is set.

Required values:
- background_identifier: The ID of the Video background
- show_percentage: Set to 'true' to show percentage instead of time

To get the identifier of a background, right-click the
editor background and click on 'Copy Background Identifier'.
languages.简体中文:
Returns either the current play time of a Video menu background
(MM:SS format) or the play progress percentage (0-100).
Returns '00:00' or '0' if the element is not ready yet or no video is set.

Required values:
- background_identifier: The ID of the Video background
- show_percentage: Set to 'true' to show percentage instead of time

To get the identifier of a background, right-click the
editor background and click on 'Copy Background Identifier'.
languages.繁體中文:
Returns either the current play time of a Video menu background
(MM:SS format) or the play progress percentage (0-100).
Returns '00:00' or '0' if the element is not ready yet or no video is set.

Required values:
- background_identifier: The ID of the Video background
- show_percentage: Set to 'true' to show percentage instead of time

To get the identifier of a background, right-click the
editor background and click on 'Copy Background Identifier'.

languages.English:
- The Material List hotkey will open the last viewed Material List,
   if there is one stored
- To switch to a different Material List, open one via
   the GUI button in the Placement Configuration GUI or
   the schematic browser
- The stored/last viewed list is also forgot
   if the selected Schematic Placement is changed
- If there is no last viewed Material List yet,
   then the selected Placement is used, if there is one
languages.简体中文:
- 材料清单热键将打开上次查看的材料清单,
   如果有一个存储
- 要切换到其他材料列表,请打开一个
   放置配置GUI中的GUI按钮或原理图浏览器
- 存储/上次查看的列表也会被忘记
 如果选择的原理图放置已更改
- 如果还没有最后查看的材料清单,
 然后使用选定的放置,如果有的话
languages.繁體中文:
- The Material List hotkey will open the last viewed Material List,
   if there is one stored
- To switch to a different Material List, open one via
   the GUI button in the Placement Configuration GUI or
   the schematic browser
- The stored/last viewed list is also forgot
   if the selected Schematic Placement is changed
- If there is no last viewed Material List yet,
   then the selected Placement is used, if there is one

languages.English:
This option determines how to use Vanilla default font.
Ignore All: use Modern UI font (Force Unicode Font).
Keep ASCII: keep ASCII fonts.
Keep Other: keep fonts other than ASCII fonts.
Keep All: keep all fonts except the Unicode font.
Only Include: only include specified fonts.
Only Exclude: only exclude specified fonts.
languages.简体中文:
该选项决定如何使用原版默认字体。
忽略全部：使用 Modern UI 字体（强制Unicode字体）。
保留ASCII：保留ASCII字体。
保留其他：保留除了ASCII之外的其他字体。
保留全部：保留除了Unicode之外的其他字体。
仅包含：仅包含指定的字体。
仅不包含：仅不包含指定的字体。
languages.繁體中文:
此選項確定如何使用原版的預設字型。
忽略全部：使用 Modern UI 字型（強制使用 Unicode 字型）。
保留 ASCII：保留 ASCII 字型。
保留其他：保留除 ASCII 字型以外的字型。
全部保留：保留除 Unicode 字型以外的所有字型。

languages.English:
Manual - you are asked to select and confirm the world map every time you switch worlds or dimensions. 
 
 World Spawn - the world map is selected and confirmed automatically based on the world spawn point that the game client is aware of. Can break if the server is using the vanilla compass item for a custom function. 
 
 Single - each dimension has a single world map that is automatically confirmed. Useful for simple servers with a single world. 
 
 Server - install the world map mod on the server side to use this automatic mode.
languages.简体中文:
Manual - you are asked to select and confirm the world map every time you switch worlds or dimensions. 
 
 World Spawn - the world map is selected and confirmed automatically based on the world spawn point that the game client is aware of. Can break if the server is using the vanilla compass item for a custom function. 
 
 Single - each dimension has a single world map that is automatically confirmed. Useful for simple servers with a single world. 
 
 Server - install the world map mod on the server side to use this automatic mode.
languages.繁體中文:
Manual - you are asked to select and confirm the world map every time you switch worlds or dimensions. 
 
 World Spawn - the world map is selected and confirmed automatically based on the world spawn point that the game client is aware of. Can break if the server is using the vanilla compass item for a custom function. 
 
 Single - each dimension has a single world map that is automatically confirmed. Useful for simple servers with a single world. 
 
 Server - install the world map mod on the server side to use this automatic mode.

languages.English:
LivingDropsEvent is fired when an Entity's death causes dropped items to appear. 
This event is fired whenever an Entity dies and drops items in LivingEntity.die(DamageSource). 
This event is fired via the ForgeHooks.onLivingDrops(LivingEntity, DamageSource, Collection, int, boolean).source contains the DamageSource that caused the drop to occur. drops contains the ArrayList of EntityItems that will be dropped. 
lootingLevel contains the amount of loot that will be dropped. recentlyHit determines whether the Entity doing the drop has recently been damaged. 
This event is Cancelable. If this event is canceled, the Entity does not drop anything. 
This event does not have a result. net.minecraftforge.eventbus.api.Event.HasResult  This event is fired on the MinecraftForge.EVENT_BUS
languages.简体中文:
LivingDropsEvent is fired when an Entity's death causes dropped items to appear. 
This event is fired whenever an Entity dies and drops items in LivingEntity.die(DamageSource). 
This event is fired via the ForgeHooks.onLivingDrops(LivingEntity, DamageSource, Collection, int, boolean).source contains the DamageSource that caused the drop to occur. drops contains the ArrayList of EntityItems that will be dropped. 
lootingLevel contains the amount of loot that will be dropped. recentlyHit determines whether the Entity doing the drop has recently been damaged. 
This event is Cancelable. If this event is canceled, the Entity does not drop anything. 
This event does not have a result. net.minecraftforge.eventbus.api.Event.HasResult  This event is fired on the MinecraftForge.EVENT_BUS
languages.繁體中文:
LivingDropsEvent is fired when an Entity's death causes dropped items to appear. 
This event is fired whenever an Entity dies and drops items in LivingEntity.die(DamageSource). 
This event is fired via the ForgeHooks.onLivingDrops(LivingEntity, DamageSource, Collection, int, boolean).source contains the DamageSource that caused the drop to occur. drops contains the ArrayList of EntityItems that will be dropped. 
lootingLevel contains the amount of loot that will be dropped. recentlyHit determines whether the Entity doing the drop has recently been damaged. 
This event is Cancelable. If this event is canceled, the Entity does not drop anything. 
This event does not have a result. net.minecraftforge.eventbus.api.Event.HasResult  This event is fired on the MinecraftForge.EVENT_BUS

languages.English:
All versions. Avoids rendering the sides of items in GUIs. (Yes, vanilla appears to do that.)

This can triple FPS with a mod like REI/JEI installed on weaker GPUs, if enough items are visible. Disabled by default since it's new and not tested much, but should be safe. The most likely issue is items being completely invisible in GUIs, or appearing flat in the world.
languages.简体中文:
全版本共有。避免在GUI中渲染物品的侧面。（是的，原版似乎就是这样做的。）

如果你的显卡比较差，又安装了REI/JEI这类模组，且GUI中显示了有够多的物品，此功能甚至可以使FPS增加2倍。由于此优化刚刚诞生，没有经过很多测试，所以默认情况下是禁用的，但应该能安全使用。最有可能出现的问题是物品在GUI中完全不可见，或者在世界中显示为平面。
languages.繁體中文:
所有版本。避免在介面中繪製物品的側面。(是的，看起來原版似乎這樣做。)

如果安裝了像 REI 或 JEI 這樣的模組且可見的物品足夠多，這可能會使低階顯示卡上的 FPS 提高三倍。預設停用，因為這是新功能且測試不多，但應該是安全的。最有可能的問題是物品在介面中完全看不見，或在世界中顯示為平面。

languages.English:
BabyEntitySpawnEvent is fired just before a baby entity is about to be spawned. 
Parents will have disengaged their relationship. 
Cancelable It is possible to change the child completely by using setChild(AgeableMob) This event is fired from Animal. spawnChildFromBreeding(ServerLevel, Animal) and Fox. spawnChildFromBreeding(ServerLevel, Animal)  
parentA contains the initiating parent entity. 
parentB contains the secondary parent entity. 
causedByPlayer contains the player responsible for the breading (if applicable). 
child contains the child that will be spawned.  
This event is Cancelable. If this event is canceled, the child Entity is not added to the world, and the parents will no longer attempt to mate. 
This event does not have a result. net. minecraftforge. eventbus. api. Event. 
HasResult  This event is fired on the MinecraftForge.EVENT_BUS.

languages.简体中文:
如果启用了该功能，那么粘贴时不是只使用单独的/setblock命令，
而是基于命令的粘贴操作(比如在服务器后台使用)会尝试对
同一块的任何连续区域使用/fill命令。这在单人游戏中没有效果，
因为mod直接在服务器的世界中设置方块，而且根本不使用命令。

key:
If enabled, then instead of only using individual /setblock commands,
the command-based Paste operation (which is used on servers)
will also try to use /fill commands for any continuous areas of the same block.
This has no effect in single player, since the mod sets the blocks directly
in the integrated server's world in and doesn't use commands at all.

languages.English: All versions. Enables the game to use a faster texture stitching system originally written by SuperCoder79 for lwjgl3ify on 1.7.10, which can save some time during loading. Rarely, it's been reported to cause weird artifacts on blocks or in GUIs, this may be a Sodium bug.
languages.简体中文: 全版本共有。使游戏能够使用一个效率更高的纹理拼接系统，该系统最初由SuperCoder79在1.7.10上为lwjgl3ify编写，此项可以减少一点加载时间。偶尔，有人报告说这会在方块或GUI上引起奇怪的显示假象，这可能是钠（Sodium）模组的程序错误。
languages.繁體中文: 所有版本。啟用遊戲使用由 SuperCoder79 為 1.7.10 上的 lwjgl3ify 原創的更快速的紋理拼接系統，可以在載入期間節省一些時間。極少數報告說這可能導致方塊或介面上出現奇怪的異常，這可能是 Sodium 的問題。

languages.繁體中文: This dialog system can display multiple characters simultaneously and show portraits in left, center, and right positions. (In order to save space, the corresponding resource files for the portraits are not attached to the mod)

If you want to try this our discord server is the place to get help :)

注意：如果你的整合包没有自定义的方块/物品，你不需要使用这个选项。
如果你需要，可以到我们的 discord 服务器寻求帮助 :)

languages.English:
In offset mode, the target elements will use their
normal position as origin and get animated starting from this
position instead of getting their position completely overridden.

In this mode, keyframes get saved in a different way.
The middle of the screen (crosshair) stands for
the target element and you should record keyframes
around this crosshair.
Keyframes recorded in offset mode are not compatible
with the normal mode an vice-versa, so you should
choose a mode before start recording.
languages.简体中文:
在偏移模式下，目标元素将使用其
默认位置作为起点，并在此基础上进行动画处理，
而不是完全覆盖其位置。

在此模式下，关键帧的保存方式不同。
屏幕中央的十字准星代表目标元素，
你应围绕该准星录制关键帧。
偏移模式下录制的关键帧与正常模式不兼容，
因此请在开始录制前选择模式。
languages.繁體中文:
In offset mode, the target elements will use their
normal position as origin and get animated starting from this
position instead of getting their position completely overridden.

In this mode, keyframes get saved in a different way.
The middle of the screen (crosshair) stands for
the target element and you should record keyframes
around this crosshair.
Keyframes recorded in offset mode are not compatible
with the normal mode an vice-versa, so you should
choose a mode before start recording.

languages.English:
Display message if a new version of the mod is available. To do the check we send to our servers ONLY the following information:

Your IP address is not saved!

你的IP地址没有被保存!
languages.繁體中文:
當模組有新版本可用時，會向你顯示訊息。為了進行檢查，會向伺服器傳送以下訊息:

你的IP位址沒有被儲存！

key:
Removes the timeout from the rendering worker threads.
If you get very stuttery rendering when moving around
or dealing with large schematics, try disabling this. It will however make
the schematic rendering a lot slower in some cases.

languages.English:
Check if a number matches another.

Compare Modes:
equals, bigger-than, smaller-than,
bigger-than-or-equals,
smaller-than-or-equals

Set the 3 dots after the 'mode' variable
to the compare mode you want to use.

Set the 3 dots after the 'number' variable
to the number you want to check.

Set the 3 dots after the 'compare_with'
variable to the number you want to
compare the first one with.

§xYou can check for multiple numbers/modes
§xat once by separating multiple
§xcompare sections by comma.
languages.简体中文:
检查数字是否与另一个数字匹配。

比较模式：
equals（等于）、bigger-than（大于）、smaller-than（小于）、
bigger-than-or-equals（大于等于）、smaller-than-or-equals（小于等于）

将“mode”变量后面的3个点设置为您要
使用的比较模式。

将“number”变量后面的3个点设置为您
要检查的数字。

将“compare_with”变量后面的3个点设置
为要与第一个数字进行比较的数字。

§x您可以通过用逗号分隔来一次性检查多个
§x数字/模式。
languages.繁體中文:
Check if a number matches another.

Compare Modes:
equals, bigger-than, smaller-than,
bigger-than-or-equals,
smaller-than-or-equals

Set the 3 dots after the 'mode' variable
to the compare mode you want to use.

Set the 3 dots after the 'number' variable
to the number you want to check.

Set the 3 dots after the 'compare_with'
variable to the number you want to
compare the first one with.

§xYou can check for multiple numbers/modes
§xat once by separating multiple
§xcompare sections by comma.

languages.English: Some servers put custom values in the world heightmaps, which may result in incorrectly rendered maps. Sometimes it may even happen in heavily modded singleplayer worlds. This option should fix such issues at the expense of a bit of performance. Do not use unless you have to. Reenter the world after toggling this option!
languages.简体中文: 一些服务器将自定义值放在世界高度图中，这可能会导致地图渲染不正确。 有时它甚至可能发生在经过大量修改的单人游戏世界中。 此选项应该可以解决此类问题，但会降低一点性能。 除非必须，否则不要使用。切换此选项后重新进入存档！
languages.繁體中文: Some servers put custom values in the world heightmaps, which may result in incorrectly rendered maps. Sometimes it may even happen in heavily modded singleplayer worlds. This option should fix such issues at the expense of a bit of performance. Do not use unless you have to. Reenter the world after toggling this option!

languages.English:
This event is fired when a living entity attempts to get a projectile with the LivingEntity.getProjectile(ItemStack) method. 
The item stack given is usually the item stack of a net.minecraft.world.item.ProjectileWeaponItem and the item stack returned is usually the item stack of a net.minecraft.world.entity.projectile.Projectile.
This event is not net.minecraftforge.eventbus.api.Cancelable.
This event does not have a result.net.minecraftforge.eventbus.api.Event.HasResult
This event is fired on the net.minecraftforge.common.MinecraftForge.EVENT_BUS.

%s graphics uses screen shaders for drawing weather, clouds, and particles behind translucent blocks and water.

此選項可能會嚴重影響使用行動裝置或是 4K 解析度時的效能。

languages.English: This short guide will spell out everything you need to know about building a portal, crafting keys, and raiding dungeons!
languages.简体中文: 这份简短的指南将详细说明您需要了解的有关建造传送门、制作钥匙和突袭地下城的所有信息！
languages.繁體中文: This short guide will spell out everything you need to know about building a portal, crafting keys, and raiding dungeons!

languages.English: Second, your portal requires a Keyhole Block. To craft this item take one of your 3 Gilded Portal Blocks and combine it with a Trapped Chest and an Eye of Ender.
languages.简体中文: 其次，您的传送门需要一个传送门基石。 要制作此物品，请使用您的 3 个镀金传送门块之一，并将其​​与一个陷阱箱和一个末影之眼结合起来。
languages.繁體中文: Second, your portal requires a Keyhole Block. To craft this item take one of your 3 Gilded Portal Blocks and combine it with a Trapped Chest and an Eye of Ender.

languages.English: First, your portal will require 3 Gilded Portal Blocks. To craft a Gilded Portal Block surround a Chiseled Stone Brick with 8 Gold Ingots.
languages.简体中文: 首先，您的传送门需要 3 个镀金传送门块。 用 8 个金锭围绕一块錾制石砖来制作一个镀金传送门块。
languages.繁體中文: First, your portal will require 3 Gilded Portal Blocks. To craft a Gilded Portal Block surround a Chiseled Stone Brick with 8 Gold Ingots.

languages.English: More advice will be dispensed inside the dungeons themselves.                                     (The author's penmanship looks very rushed...)
languages.简体中文: 更多的建议将在地牢内部发布。                                     （作者的文笔看起来很仓促……）
languages.繁體中文: More advice will be dispensed inside the dungeons themselves.                                     (The author's penmanship looks very rushed...)

languages.English: Once a key is activated it will always take you to the same dungeon. You will need to craft and activate more keys to visit new dungeons. Keys may be inserted and removed from keyholes any number of times.
languages.简体中文: 一旦钥匙被激活，它总是会把你带到同一个地牢。 您将需要制作和激活更多钥匙才能访问新的地牢。 钥匙可以从钥匙孔插入和取出不限次数。
languages.繁體中文: Once a key is activated it will always take you to the same dungeon. You will need to craft and activate more keys to visit new dungeons. Keys may be inserted and removed from keyholes any number of times.

languages.English: Finish your portal by placing spires 1 block away on both sides of the frame. Spires are three blocks tall and have a Gilded Portal Block on top.
languages.简体中文: 通过在框架两侧 1 个方块外放置尖顶来完成您的传送门。 尖顶高三个方块，顶部有一个镀金传送门方块。
languages.繁體中文: Finish your portal by placing spires 1 block away on both sides of the frame. Spires are three blocks tall and have a Gilded Portal Block on top.

languages.English: Your portal build starts with a frame built out of Stone Bricks, 4 blocks tall and 3 wide. (With two air blocks in the middle.) Replace the top center block with your Portal Keystone.
languages.简体中文: 您的传送门构建始于一个由石砖制成的框架，高 4 格，宽 3 格。 （中间有两个空气块。）用您的传送门基石替换顶部中间的石砖。
languages.繁體中文: Your portal build starts with a frame built out of Stone Bricks, 4 blocks tall and 3 wide. (With two air blocks in the middle.) Replace the top center block with your Portal Keystone.

languages.English: To activate a Portal Key, find a stronghold, and use the key on the top side of an End Portal Frame block. The key should now have a unique name!
languages.简体中文: 要激活传送门钥匙，请先找到一个要塞，然后对着末地传送门框架块的顶部使用钥匙。 钥匙现在应该有一个独一无二的名称了！
languages.繁體中文: To activate a Portal Key, find a stronghold, and use the key on the top side of an End Portal Frame block. The key should now have a unique name!

languages.English: Portal Keys can be crafted from a Name Tag and a Blaze Rod. But Portal Keys need to be activated before they can be used.
languages.简体中文: 传送门钥匙可以由名牌和烈焰棒制作。 但是需要激活传送门密钥才能使用它们。
languages.繁體中文: Portal Keys can be crafted from a Name Tag and a Blaze Rod. But Portal Keys need to be activated before they can be used.

languages.English:
This event allows you to change the target an entity has. 
This event is fired before LivingSetAttackTargetEvent. 
This event is fired via the ForgeHooks.onLivingChangeTarget(LivingEntity, LivingEntity, LivingChangeTargetEvent. ILivingTargetType)  getOriginalTarget() returns the target that should originally be set. 
The return value cannot be affected by calling setNewTarget(LivingEntity).getNewTarget() returns the new target that this entity will have. 
The return value can be affected by calling setNewTarget(LivingEntity).getTargetType() returns the target type that caused the change of targets. 
This event is Cancelable. If you cancel this event, the target will not be changed and it will stay the same. Cancelling this event will prevent LivingSetAttackTargetEvent from being posted. 
This event does not have a result net.minecraftforge.eventbus.api.Event.HasResult 
This event is fired on the MinecraftForge.EVENT_BUS.

The return value can be affected by calling setNewTarget(LivingEntity).getTargetType() returns the target type that caused the change of targets.

languages.简体中文:
是否为所有领域服使用通用配置文件名。
如果禁用此选项，则在生成的配置文件名称中使用服务器 IP 和端口。
由于领域服的地址会定期修改，因此配置文件名会一直变化，从而导致配置无法正确保存和读取。
因此，如果您只在一台领域服上玩游玩，请保持启用此功能。
如果您在多个领域服上玩游玩...那么多个领域服的配置会混淆，
除非您在登录不同的的领域服时使用不同的 Minecraft 实例，
这样不同服务器的配置会分别保存在不同的 Minecraft 实例中。

languages.简体中文:
如果启用该功能，而不是使用已经配置的setblock或fill命令，
则使用World Edit的 //pos1， //pos2和//set命令。
注意，使用创世神指令会比正常粘贴大约慢3倍
且由于每tick的命令限制，比起使用普通命令，
我们需要每个块或区域执行多个命令(//pos1 //pos2 //set)。
§6警告:如果使用创世神指令或fill命令而不是单独的setblock命令!
§6粘贴与替换功能将无法使用！
因此，如果您有权限运行它们，建议使用普通命令。
另一件让你在某些情况下更喜欢使用WE命令的事情是，
如果服务器没有Carpet mod所导致的'/ Carpet fillUpdates false'
规则不可用时，可以使用该功能防止方块更新。

key:
If enabled, instead of using the configured setblock and fill commands,
the World Edit //pos1, //pos2 and //set commands are used.
Note that using World Edit commands is around 3x slower
than using vanilla commands due to the command limit per tick,
and WE requiring multiple commands per block or area (//pos1 //pos2 //set).
§6WARNING: The paste replace behavior option WILL NOT WORK if using
§6the World Edit commands and fill volumes instead of individual setblock commands!
Thus it's recommended to use the vanilla commands, if you have the permission to run them.
One other thing that might make you prefer WE commands in some cases
is that they can prevent block updates, if the server doesn't have
the Carpet mod and thus the '/carpet fillUpdates false' rule available.

languages.English:
Not Enough Crashes can severely break the game while handling crashes, and does not provide accurate results.
A good alternative is MixinTrace, which can identify the cause of a crash more reliably and does not put the game in an invalid state.
languages.简体中文:
在处理崩溃时，Not Enough Crashes 会严重破坏游戏，而且无法提供准确的结果。
好的替代品有 MixinTrace，它们都可以更准确地识别崩溃原因并且不会使游戏处于无效状态。
languages.繁體中文:
「Not Enough Crashes」可能會在處理崩潰問題時，對遊戲造成嚴重破壞，並且無法提供精確結果。
建議使用「MixinTrace」代替，它在辨識崩潰原因上更可靠，並且不會讓遊戲處於無效狀態。

languages.简体中文:
如果启用该选项，原理图中如果有空气或其他块，
那么任何的“额外块”或“错误块”的液体将被忽略。
基本上，这使得在水下建造东西少了很多麻烦。
注意:你很可能还想同时启用'renderCollidingSchematicBlocks（渲染重叠块）'，以允许块在流体中渲染。

key:
If enabled, then any fluid blocks are ignored as "extra blocks"
and as "wrong blocks", ie. where the schematic has air or other blocks.
Basically this makes building stuff under water a whole lot less annoying.
Note: You will most likely also want to enable the 'renderCollidingSchematicBlocks'
option at the same time, to allow the blocks to get rendered inside fluids.

languages.English: Allows you to change the maximum distance for shadows. Terrain and entities beyond this distance will not cast shadows. Lowering the shadow distance can significantly increase performance.
languages.简体中文: 允许更改阴影的最远距离。超出此距离的地形和实体不会投射阴影。降低阴影距离可以显著提高性能。
languages.繁體中文: 能讓您變更陰影的最大距離。超出此距離的地形和實體將不會有陰影。降低陰影距離能顯著提升效能。

languages.English: All versions. Allows the game to unload structure files after generation concludes instead of keeping them loaded forever.
languages.简体中文: 全版本共有。允许游戏在结构生成结束后卸载结构文件，而非让它们永远处于已加载状态。

languages.English: Decreases the amount of time it takes for a fish to bite the hook.

languages.English:
Reloads FancyMenu, including stuff like
panoramas, slideshows, etc.

重载FancyMenu，包括但不限于
全景图、幻灯片等。
languages.繁體中文:
Reloads FancyMenu, including stuff like
panoramas, slideshows, etc.

languages.English: Set the delay between ticks in milliseconds.
languages.简体中文: 设置游戏刻之间的延迟（单位：毫秒）。
languages.繁體中文: Set the delay between ticks in milliseconds.

languages.English: Gives the shield a bash attack.
languages.简体中文: Gives the shield a bash attack.
languages.繁體中文: Gives the shield a bash attack.

languages.English: Avoids storing a codec for every block(state) and instead generates and caches it on the fly when needed. Generally not worth enabling unless you have a million blocks/items.
languages.简体中文: 不再给每个方块（状态）都存储一个编解码器，只在需要时动态生成、缓存它。通常不值得启用，除非你有一百万个方块/物品。
languages.繁體中文: 避免為每個方塊(狀態)儲存編解碼器，而是在需要時動態生成並快取它。通常情況下，除非有數百萬個方塊、物品，否則不值得啟用。

languages.English:
This controls how is NBT compared.
'Exact' means that NBT must fully match.
'Allow Extra' means that only tags that are the same will be compared.
languages.简体中文:
这控制如何比较NBT。
'精准'表示NBT必须完全匹配。
'允许附加'表示只比较相同的标签。
languages.繁體中文:
這控制如何比較NBT。
'精準'表示NBT必須完全符合。
'允許附加'表示只比較相同的標籤。

languages.English: Rewrites the advancement checking logic to be faster and not cause StackOverflowError in large packs. Port of Advancements Debug from Fabric.
languages.简体中文: 重写进度检查逻辑，使其更快，且在大型整合包里不再会产生§b堆栈溢出错误（StackOverflowError）§r。这是Fabric进度调试功能的移植。
languages.繁體中文: 重寫了進度檢查邏輯，使其更快且在大型包中不引起 StackOverflowError。是 Fabric 中 Advancements Debug 的移植。

languages.English: If enabled, zooming will be possible in the mirrored view (when you see yourself).

languages.English:
The requirement mode defines what
the requirement should tell its parent
when its condition is met.

§zNORMAL §rmeans, it returns TRUE ("Yes, load!")
when its condition is met.

§zOPPOSITE §rmeans, it returns TRUE when
its condition is NOT met.
languages.简体中文:
条件模式定义了当条件满足时应返回的值。

§z普通§r模式下条件满足时返回真。

§z相反§r模式下条件不满足时返回真。
languages.繁體中文:
The requirement mode defines what
the requirement should tell its parent
when its condition is met.

§zNORMAL §rmeans, it returns TRUE ("Yes, load!")
when its condition is met.

§zOPPOSITE §rmeans, it returns TRUE when
its condition is NOT met.

languages.English:
Enable Forge to queue all chunk updates to the Chunk Update thread.
May increase FPS significantly, but may also cause weird rendering lag.
Not recommended for computers without a significant number of cores available.
languages.简体中文: 启用此选项后，Forge会将所有区块更新加入独立的区块更新线程。此选项或能大幅提升FPS，但同时也有可能产生奇怪的渲染卡顿。不推荐在可用核心数低的电脑上启用此选项。
languages.繁體中文: 啟用以讓 Forge 將所有區塊更新列隊於區塊更新執行緒。應能大幅提升 FPS，但也有可能造成奇怪的渲染卡頓。不建議用於可用核心數較少的電腦上。

languages.English: If enabled, only the sides of blocks which are facing the camera will be submitted for rendering. This can eliminate a large number of block faces very early in the rendering process, saving memory bandwidth and time on the GPU. Some resource packs may have issues with this option, so try disabling it if you're seeing holes in blocks.

This can eliminate a large number of block faces very early in the rendering process, saving memory bandwidth and time on the GPU. Some resource packs may have issues with this option, so try disabling it if you're seeing holes in blocks.
languages.繁體中文: If enabled, only the sides of blocks which are facing the camera will be submitted for rendering. This can eliminate a large number of block faces very early in the rendering process, saving memory bandwidth and time on the GPU. Some resource packs may have issues with this option, so try disabling it if you're seeing holes in blocks.

Returns either the current play time of a Video element

- show_percentage: Set to 'true' to show percentage instead of time

languages.English:
Replaces text in a string using either literal text or regular expressions (regex).
Supports both single replacement and replace-all operations.

Required values:
- text: The input text to perform replacements on
- search: The text or regex pattern to search for

Optional values:
- replacement: The replacement text (default: empty string)
- use_regex: Set to 'true' to use regex patterns (default: 'false')
- replace_all: Set to 'true' to replace all occurrences, otherwise only first occurrence (default: 'true')

When using regex, you can use capture groups like $1, $2, etc.

- use_regex: Set to 'true' to use regex patterns (default: 'false')

When using regex, you can use capture groups like $1, $2, etc.

languages.English:
All versions. Modifies DFU initialization to happen the first time something needs to be upgraded. This sounds similar to LazyDFU but is distinctly implemented, as it avoids loading *any* DFU classes/data structures, while LazyDFU only disables rule optimization. Essentially, this option is a safer version of DataFixerSlayer as it will still load DFU when needed.

You should typically continue to use LazyDFU even with this option enabled, as otherwise DFU rule optimization will cause lag.
languages.简体中文:
全版本共有。修改了DFU的初始化，使其仅在第一次需要升级数据时加载。这听起来类似DFU载入优化，但实现方式截然不同，因为它能避免加载§o任何§rDFU类/数据结构，而DFU载入优化只是禁用其规则优化。本质上说，这是一个DataFixerSlayer的安全版本，因为它仍然会在需要时加载DFU。

即使启用了这个选项，你也应该继续使用DFU载入优化，否则DFU规则优化依然会导致卡顿。
languages.繁體中文:
所有版本。修改 DFU 初始化，使其在首次需要進行升級時發生。這聽起來類似於 LazyDFU，但實際上是不同實現，因為它避免載入 *任何* DFU 類、資料結構，而 LazyDFU 僅停用規則最佳化。基本上，此選項是 DataFixerSlayer 的更安全版本，因為它在需要時仍會載入 DFU。

一般情況下，即使啟用此選項，您仍應繼續使用 LazyDFU，因為否則 DFU 規則最佳化將導致卡頓。

languages.English:
A set of fallback font families for the default typeface list.
Outline fonts (TrueType/OpenType) are supported, each line can be one of the following two cases:
1) Font family name in English for registered fonts, for instance: Segoe UI
2) Absolute path for font files on your PC, for instance: D:/Fonts/Andy Bold.ttf
Note that for TTC/OTC font, it's recommended to register it and select one of font families. Otherwise, only the first font family in the TrueType/OpenType Collection will be used.
languages.简体中文:
默认字体列表的一组回退字体家族。
支持轮廓字体（TrueType/OpenType），每一行可以是以下两种情况之一：
1) 已注册字体的字体家族英文名，例如：Segoe UI
2) 字体文件的绝对路径，例如：D:/Fonts/Andy Bold.ttf
注意，对于 TTC/OTC 字体，推荐先注册再选择其中一个字体家族。否则，只有 TrueType/OpenType 合集中的第一个字体家族会被使用。
languages.繁體中文:
預設字型清單的後備字型系列。
支援輪廓字型（TrueType/OpenType），每行可以是下列兩種情況之一：
1）英語註冊字型的字型系列名稱，例如：Segoe UI
2）你 PC 裝置上字型檔案的絕對路徑，例如：D:/Fonts/Andy Bold.ttf

languages.English:
Supports player names, entity/item identifiers or patterns with special characters * ) ( and |. 
 
 * - matches anything. 
 )( - parenthesis, mostly for usage with |. 
 | - the OR operator to match different sequences in the same location. 
 
 For example: 
 minecraft:creeper 
 minecraft:zombie(_villager|_horse) - zombie villagers and horses. 
 minecraft:a*l - any vanilla entity which starts with 'a' and ends with 'l'.
languages.简体中文:
支持带有特殊字符 * ) ( 和 | 的实体标识符或匹配模式。 
 
 * - 匹配任何内容。 
 ) ( - 括号，主要与 | 一起使用。 
 | - “或”运算符以匹配相同位置的不同序列。 
 
 例如： 
 minecraft:creeper 
 minecraft:zombie(_villager|_horse) - 僵尸村民和马。 
 minecraft:a*l - 任何以“a”开头并以“l”结尾的原版实体。
languages.繁體中文:
Supports player names, entity/item identifiers or patterns with special characters * ) ( and |. 
 
 * - matches anything. 
 )( - parenthesis, mostly for usage with |. 
 | - the OR operator to match different sequences in the same location. 
 
 For example: 
 minecraft:creeper 
 minecraft:zombie(_villager|_horse) - zombie villagers and horses. 
 minecraft:a*l - any vanilla entity which starts with 'a' and ends with 'l'.

languages.English:
The group mode defines how the group

to be TRUE, which basically just
means they need to say "Yes, load!".

needs to be TRUE.

languages.English:
Minecraft has run out of memory.

This could be caused by a bug in the game or by the Java Virtual Machine not being allocated enough memory.

To prevent level corruption, the current game has quit. We've tried to free up enough memory to let you go back to the main menu and back to playing, but this may not have worked.

Please restart the game if you see this message again.
languages.简体中文:
Minecraft已耗尽内存。

原因可能是游戏存在漏洞，或分配给Java虚拟机的内存过少。

为避免世界损坏，当前游戏已退出。我们已尝试腾出内存，让你可以回到主菜单并继续游戏，但这不一定奏效。

如果你再次看见此消息，请重启游戏。
languages.繁體中文:
Minecraft 記憶體不足。

可能是由於遊戲錯誤，或配置給 Java 虛擬機器的記憶體不足。

為防止世界損毀，已結束目前遊戲。我們已嘗試釋放記憶體，讓您返回主選單並繼續遊玩，但這個方法也可能無法解決問題。

如果您再次看到此訊息，請重新啟動遊戲。

languages.简体中文:
取消隐藏Schematic VCS(版本控制系统)菜单按钮，
并启用热键和VCS功能。(这之前被称为原理图项目。)

一般来说，你不应该使用这个功能，
除非你真的知道它是如何工作的。
它在一定程度上改变了区域选择、放置和粘贴的工作方式，
特别是在粘贴时还存在一个区域删除操作。

基本上，这个功能是为更新、修改原理图而设计的，
它允许你更容易地为同一版本原理图创建多个版本/快照，
也可以通过先删除当前版本，
然后粘贴下一个版本来在不同版本之间切换。

key:
Un-hides the Schematic VCS (Version Control System) menu button,
and enables the hotkey and the VCS functionality in general.
(This was called Schematic Projects before.)

In general you §6should not§r be using this feature,
unless you really know how it works and what it does.
It somewhat changes how the area selections, placements and pasting works,
in particular that there is also an area delete operation when pasting.

Basically this feature is intended for §6iterative, in-place§r design work,
and it allows you to easier create multiple versions/snapshots
of the same build, and also to switch between the versions by deleting what is
in the world first, and then pasting the next version in its place.

languages.English: All versions. Many mods ship outdated structure files, which requires the game to upgrade them using DFU every single time they are loaded. This can be quite slow. This patch adds logic to instead save the upgraded version of the structure, and reuse it on the next load. To handle the case that the mod changes a structure file but not the name, the original file's hash is compared against the cached version, and if they do not match the structure will be upgraded again.
languages.简体中文: 全版本共有。许多模组的结构文件已经过时，这就要求游戏在每次加载它们时都要用DFU来升级它们。这个升级过程可能会很慢。此补丁添加了一些逻辑，保存结构的升级版本，并在下次加载时直接重用它们。为了处理模组改变了结构文件但没有改变名称的情况，原始文件的哈希值将与被缓存的版本进行比较，若不匹配，该结构将被再次升级。
languages.繁體中文: 所有版本。許多模組發布過時的結構檔案，需要遊戲每次載入時使用 DFU 進行升級。這可能會相當慢。此補丁增加了邏輯，以儲存結構的升級版本，並在下一次載入時重複使用它。為處理模組變更結構檔案但未變更名稱的情況，將原始檔案的雜湊值與快取版本進行比較，如果它們不匹配，則結構將被再次升級。

Returns the currently active HUD title or subtitle.

languages.English:
An invisible box around the vanilla boss health display that pushes the mod's interfaces out of the way. 
 
 Normal type's collision box is equal to its size and only pushes interfaces by the necessary distance. 
 
 Screen Height type's collision box is stretched across the whole screen height and always shifts colliding interfaces vertically by the Normal type's height. This can be very useful when you have multiple interfaces in a column and want all of them to be pushed.
languages.简体中文:
原版Boss生命条周围有一个隐形碰撞箱将模组的界面推开。 
 
 正常类型的碰撞箱等于它的大小，并且只将界面推开必要的距离。 
 
 屏幕高度类型的碰撞箱拉伸到整个屏幕高度，并且总是以正常类型的高度垂直移动碰撞的界面。 当你在一列中有多个界面并希望所有这些界面都被推开时，这将非常有用。
languages.繁體中文:
An invisible box around the vanilla boss health display that pushes the mod's interfaces out of the way. 
 
 Normal type's collision box is equal to its size and only pushes interfaces by the necessary distance. 
 
 Screen Height type's collision box is stretched across the whole screen height and always shifts colliding interfaces vertically by the Normal type's height. This can be very useful when you have multiple interfaces in a column and want all of them to be pushed.

languages.English:
Check if the current GUI scale is X.

You can check for bigger than ('>'),
smaller than ('<') and equals X.

For example, if you want to check
if the scale is smaller than 3.20,
type '<3.20' (without the '').
To check if the scale is equal to 1.0,
just type '1.0' (without the '').
When checking if the scale is bigger than 2.20,
type '>2.20' (without the '').
languages.简体中文:
检查当前GUI缩放比例是否为X。

检查方法包含大于（“>”）、小于 （“<”） 以及等于X。

例如，如果您想检查缩放比例是否小于3.20，请输
入“<3.20”（不含双引号）。 检查缩放比例是否等
于1.0时，仅需输入“1.0”（不含双引号）。 检查缩
放比例是否大于2.20时，输入“>2.20”（不含双引号）。
languages.繁體中文:
Check if the current GUI scale is X.

You can check for bigger than ('>'),
smaller than ('<') and equals X.

For example, if you want to check
if the scale is smaller than 3.20,
type '<3.20' (without the '').
To check if the scale is equal to 1.0,
just type '1.0' (without the '').
When checking if the scale is bigger than 2.20,
type '>2.20' (without the '').

languages.繁體中文: Mapping mode that can go deeper than the surface blocks, mainly to display underground caves and interiors of buildings. The ceiling size refers to the size of a horizontal "square" of solid blocks that has to be detected above you to activate the cave mode.

languages.简体中文:
要使用的“准确放置协议”的类型。
- Auto：在单人游戏中使用 v3，在多人游戏中默认仅使用 Plate only，
  除非服务器具有Carpet mod且发送了“carpet:hello”的数据包 ，
  在这种情况下，在该服务器上使用 v2。
-  Version 3：目前仅受 Litematica 本身的支持（单人游戏）。
-  Version 2：与带有 Carpet mod 的服务器兼容
  （Skyrising 和 DeadlyMC 的 QuickCarpet 或
  FabricCarpet 之外的 CarpetExtra。在这两种情况下，
  需要在服务器上启用“accurateBlockPlacement”地毯规则）。
- Slabs only：仅修复最新版本。 与 Paper 服务器兼容。
- None：不修改协议。

key:
The type of "accurate placement protocol" to use.
- Auto: Uses v3 in single player, and by default Slabs-only in multiplayer,
  unless the server has Carpet mod that sends a 'carpet:hello'
  packet, in which case v2 is used on that server.
- Version 3: Only supported by Litematica itself (in single player) for now.
- Version 2: Compatible with servers with the Carpet mod
  (either QuickCarpet by skyrising and DeadlyMC,
  or CarpetExtra in addition to FabricCarpet.
  And in both cases the 'accurateBlockPlacement' Carpet rule needs
  to be enabled on the server).
- Slabs only: Only fixes top slabs. Compatible with Paper servers.
- None: Does not modify coordinates.

languages.English:
LivingDamageEvent is fired just before damage is applied to entity. At this point armor, potion and absorption modifiers have already been applied to damage - this is FINAL value. 
Also note that appropriate resources (like armor durability and absorption extra hearths) have already been consumed. 
This event is fired whenever an Entity is damaged in LivingEntity#actuallyHurt(DamageSource, float) and Player#actuallyHurt(DamageSource, float). 
This event is fired via the ForgeHooks.onLivingDamage(LivingEntity, DamageSource, float).source contains the DamageSource that caused this Entity to be hurt. amount contains the final amount of damage that will be dealt to entity.  
This event is Cancelable. If this event is canceled, the Entity is not hurt. Used resources WILL NOT be restored. 
This event does not have a result net.minecraftforge.eventbus.api.event.HasResult

This event is fired via the ForgeHooks.onLivingDamage(LivingEntity, DamageSource, float).source contains the DamageSource that caused this Entity to be hurt. amount contains the final amount of damage that will be dealt to entity.

This event does not have a result net.minecraftforge.eventbus.api.event.HasResult

languages.English: You are trying to teleport to a sub-world that is not connected to the current auto one. If you are sure that this sub-world is from the same sub-server/world save as the auto one, then you can enable teleportation by adding a connection in the waypoint screen -> Options -> Add Sub-World Connection. But beware, if you connect unrelated sub-worlds and teleport, then there is a good chance you will suffocate in a block or die from fall damage, so be careful and connect only the right ones.
languages.简体中文: 你正试图传送到一个未连接到当前auto子世界的子世界。如果你确定这个子世界来自auto子服务器/世界，那么你可以通过在路径点界面 -> 选项 -> 添加子世界连接中添加连接来启用传送。但请注意，如果你连接不相关的子世界并进行传送，那么你很有可能会在方块中窒息或因坠落伤害而死亡，因此请小心并仅连接正确的子世界。
languages.繁體中文: You are trying to teleport to a sub-world that is not connected to the current auto one. If you are sure that this sub-world is from the same sub-server/world save as the auto one, then you can enable teleportation by adding a connection in the waypoint screen -> Options -> Add Sub-World Connection. But beware, if you connect unrelated sub-worlds and teleport, then there is a good chance you will suffocate in a block or die from fall damage, so be careful and connect only the right ones.

languages.English:
Gets NBT data from entities and blocks (similar to '/data get' command).
Returns the value at the specified NBT path.

§lTIP: §rUse the '/data get' command in-game without setting a path
to easily get all available NBT paths for an entity or block!

Required values:
- source_type: The data source type ('entity' or 'block')
- nbt_path: The NBT path to query (e.g. 'foodLevel', 'Pos[0]', 'Inventory[0].id')

Conditional values:
- entity_selector: Entity selector when source_type is 'entity'
  Supports: @s (self), @p (nearest player), @e (nearest entity),
  UUID, or entity name
- block_pos: Block position when source_type is 'block'
  Format: 'x y z' (e.g. '100 64 -200')

Optional values:
- scale: Scale factor for numeric values (default: 1.0)
- return_type: How to return the data (default: 'value')
  Options: 'value' (numeric/size), 'string' (text value),
  'snbt' (formatted NBT), 'json' (JSON format)

Returns empty string if data cannot be accessed or path is invalid.

languages.English: All versions. Uses a more efficient backing map for compound NBT tags that deduplicates key names and also uses an array map for very small compounds. This reduces the overhead of storing many compound tags in memory.
languages.简体中文: 全版本共有。对复合NBT标签使用一个更加高效的支持映射（backing map），从而消除重复键名，对小型复合 NBT 也使用数组映射。这减少了在内存中存储许多复合NBT标签的开销。
languages.繁體中文: 所有版本。對於複合 NBT 標籤，使用一個更有效的背景地圖，去重鍵名，同時對於非常小的複合體使用陣列地圖。這減少了在記憶體中儲存許多複合標籤的開銷。

languages.English:
1.16 & 1.19 only. **A key optimization.**

In the middle of the 1.16 development cycle, Forge patched the game to reload datapacks twice when loading an existing world, in order to fix an issue with biome ID shifting. Unfortunately, datapack reloads often take upwards of 30 seconds and so this very severely affects world loading times.

ModernFix makes the necessary changes to avoid this reload, based on the unfinished Forge PR #8163.

This change was removed by Forge in 1.18, but then a similar patch was added *again* in 1.19 to fix mod datapacks not being loaded when creating new singleplayer worlds. Fortunately, the issue is localized to the world creation screen in 1.19, and existing worlds only require a single reload. However, this still doubles the length of the lag spike when clicking "Create New World" in 1.19, and so ModernFix again makes changes to not perform a redundant reload.
languages.简体中文:
仅1.16&1.19。§l一项关键优化。§r

在1.16开发周期的中期，Forge对游戏打了补丁，在加载现有世界时重载两次数据包，来解决生物群系ID转移的问题。不幸地是，数据包重载往往需要30秒以上的时间，所以这非常严重地影响了世界加载时间。

基于未完成的Forge PR#8163，现代化修复做了必要的修改来避免这种重载。

Forge在1.18版本删除了此改动，但随后在1.19版本中§o又再次§r添加了一个类似补丁，来修复新建单人世界时无法加载模组数据包的问题。幸运的是，在1.19版本中此问题仅限于世界创建屏幕，现有的世界只需要重载一次。然而，在1.19版本中点击“创建新世界”时，这依然使卡顿峰值的长度翻倍，因此现代化修复再次做出修改，不执行多余的重载。
languages.繁體中文:
僅限 1.16 和 1.19。**一項關鍵最佳化。**

在 1.16 開發週期的中間，Forge 對遊戲進行了補丁，以在載入現有世界時重新載入資料包兩次，以解決生態 ID 位移的問題。不幸的是，資料包重新載入通常需要超過 30 秒，因此這極大地影響了世界載入時間。

ModernFix 進行了必要的變更，以避免這種重新載入，基於未完成的 Forge PR #8163。

這一變更在 1.18 中被 Forge 刪除，但在 1.19 中又增加了 *相似的* 補丁，以解決在建立新的單人世界時未載入模組資料包的問題。幸運的是，在 1.19 中，這個問題僅局限於建立世界的畫面，現有的世界只需要再重新載入。但是，這仍然會在 1.19 中點擊「建立新世界」時使卡頓時間加倍，因此 ModernFix 再次進行了變更，以避免執行多餘的重新載入。

The angel core places a block on the opposite side of the block (or row of blocks) you are facing. Maximum distance depends on wand tier. Right click empty space to place a block in midair. To do that, you'll need to have the block you want to place in your offhand.
languages.简体中文: 天使核心可将一个方块放置在你所面对的方块(或一排方块)的对面。最大距离取决于手杖材质。在空地上手持手杖并单击鼠标右键即可在空中放置方块。要做到这一点。你需要将想要被在空中放置的方块放在你的副手栏中。
languages.繁體中文: The angel core places a block on the opposite side of the block (or row of blocks) you are facing. Maximum distance depends on wand tier. Right click empty space to place a block in midair. To do that, you'll need to have the block you want to place in your offhand.

key:
If enabled, then block entities ae not pasted at all
via the command-based pasting in multiplayer.
This allows you to easier paste in two passes if you
want to use the NBT-restore option for inventories etc. in the second pass,
which usually requires a lot slower pasting speed/command rate.

languages.English:
Stringifies a text by escaping all
syntax characters ( " { } ).

This is useful when nesting other
placeholders as value. If the
replaced nested placeholder could
contain syntax characters that aren't
part of another placeholder, you need
to escape them.

§xPlaceholders in the value will be
§xreplaced first, so you don't need
§xto worry about them getting stringified.
languages.简体中文:
通过转义所有语法字符（" { }）来字符
串化文本。

当嵌套其他占位符作为值时非常有用。
如果已解析的嵌套占位符包含不属于
另一个占位符的语法字符，则需要对
它们进行转义。

§x文本中的占位符会首先被解析，因此
§x您无需担心它们被字符串化。
languages.繁體中文:
Stringifies a text by escaping all
syntax characters ( " { } ).

This is useful when nesting other
placeholders as value. If the
replaced nested placeholder could
contain syntax characters that aren't
part of another placeholder, you need
to escape them.

§xPlaceholders in the value will be
§xreplaced first, so you don't need
§xto worry about them getting stringified.

languages.English: This is an editor for Patchouli book entries. It's meant to be used for development or translation. There's no use for it if you're a player.$(br2)Please reference the $(l:https://github.com/Vazkii/Patchouli/wiki/Text-Formatting-101)Patchouli wiki$() for usable control codes.

languages.繁體中文: This is an editor for Patchouli book entries. It's meant to be used for development or translation. There's no use for it if you're a player.$(br2)Please reference the $(l:https://github.com/Vazkii/Patchouli/wiki/Text-Formatting-101)Patchouli wiki$() for usable control codes.

languages.English: Reload and resave all regions on the map without having to manually visit them. World save maps will be converted into normal map data saved to a separate map instance "Converted World Save", stored in the folder "cm$converted", which can be transferred to multiplayer map instances for the same world, using file manager. The reloading process will work in the background and turn off when it's done. It is important to note that going to another dimension will pause it until you come back and changing maps will fully cancel it.
languages.简体中文: Reload and resave all regions on the map without having to manually visit them. World save maps will be converted into normal map data saved to a separate map instance "Converted World Save", stored in the folder "cm$converted", which can be transferred to multiplayer map instances for the same world, using file manager. The reloading process will work in the background and turn off when it's done. It is important to note that going to another dimension will pause it until you come back and changing maps will fully cancel it.
languages.繁體中文: Reload and resave all regions on the map without having to manually visit them. World save maps will be converted into normal map data saved to a separate map instance "Converted World Save", stored in the folder "cm$converted", which can be transferred to multiplayer map instances for the same world, using file manager. The reloading process will work in the background and turn off when it's done. It is important to note that going to another dimension will pause it until you come back and changing maps will fully cancel it.

languages.English:
Select a sub-category and go to its Settings to configure things like dot color, names, icons etc. 
 
 Sub-categories that are higher on the list are prioritized when multiple sub-categories include the same entity! Keep that in mind when creating custom categories. Usually, a new custom category should be placed at the top.
languages.简体中文:
选择一个子类别并转到其设置以配置点颜色、名称、图标等内容。 
 
 当多个子类别包含同一实体时，列表中较高的子类别优先！ 创建自定义类别时请记住这一点。 通常，新的自定义类别应该会被放在顶部。
languages.繁體中文:
Select a sub-category and go to its Settings to configure things like dot color, names, icons etc. 
 
 Sub-categories that are higher on the list are prioritized when multiple sub-categories include the same entity! Keep that in mind when creating custom categories. Usually, a new custom category should be placed at the top.

languages.English:
When enabled, Modern UI will compute texel density in device-space to determine whether to use SDF text or bilinear sampling.
This feature requires GLSL 400 or above, otherwise Modern UI always uses standard SDF text rendering.
This generally decreases performance but provides better rendering quality.
This option only applies to outline fonts.
languages.简体中文:
启用时，Modern UI 会计算设备空间中的纹素密度来决定使用SDF文字还是双线性采样。
该特性需要 GLSL 400 或更高版本，否则 Modern UI 总是使用标准SDF文字渲染。
这通常会降低性能，但提供了更好的渲染质量。
该选项只适用于轮廓字体。
languages.繁體中文:
啟用時，Modern UI 將在裝置空間中計算紋理像素密度，以確定是否使用 SDF 文字或雙線性採樣。
此功能需要 GLSL 400 或以上版本，否則 Modern UI 將始終使用標準 SDF 文字繪製。
通常會降低效能，但提供更好的繪製品質。
此選項僅適用於輪廓字型。

languages.English:
The %1$s can place up to %2$s blocks at the side of a building facing you and lasts %3$s.

Hold down %5$s and scroll to change placement restriction (Horizontal, Vertical, North/South, East/West, No lock).

Open the option screen with %6$s§9+Right click§0.

§5§nUNDO§0§r
Holding down §9Sneak+§0%4$s while looking at a blocks will show you the last blocks you placed with a green border around them. §9Sneak+§0%4$s§9+Right clicking§0 any of them will undo the operation, giving you all the items back. If you used the Destruction core, it will restore the blocks.

§5§nCONTAINERS§0§r
Shulker boxes, bundles and many containers from other mods can provide building blocks for the wand.

§5§nOFFHAND PRIORITY§0§r
Having blocks in your offhand will place them instead of the block you're looking at.
languages.简体中文:
%1$s可以在建筑物面向你的一侧放置最多%2$s个方块，持续时间为%3$s。

按住%5$s并滚动以更改放置限制（水平、垂直、北/南、东/西、无锁定）。

在选项配置GUI上打开%6$s§9+右键单击§0。

§5§nUNDO§0§r
在查看方块时向下折叠§9Sneak+§0%4$s将显示你放置的最后一个方块,并在其周围加上绿色边框。§9潜行+§0%4$s§9+右键单击其中任何一个方块将撤消操作,并将所有以此法放置的方块重返至玩家背包。如果你使用了破坏核心,它将恢复方块。

§5§n容器§0§r
潜影盒、收纳袋和许多其它模组存在于玩家背包内的容器都可以为建筑手杖提供构建所需的方块。

§5§非即时优先级§0§r
如果玩家在使用手杖时副手栏持有所需方块将被放置,而不是只是在你的手里放着。
languages.繁體中文:
The %1$s can place up to %2$s blocks at the side of a building facing you and lasts %3$s.

§5§nUNDO§0§r
Holding down §9Sneak+§0%4$s while looking at a blocks will show you the last blocks you placed with a green border around them. §9Sneak+§0%4$s§9+Right clicking§0 any of them will undo the operation, giving you all the items back. If you used the Destruction core, it will restore the blocks.

§5§nCONTAINERS§0§r
Shulker boxes, bundles and many containers from other mods can provide building blocks for the wand.

languages.English:
The progress source is the current progress
as percentage number between 0 and 100 or
floating point number between 0.0 and 1.0,
depending on the progress value mode.
The source supports placeholders, so there's
nothing that holds you from getting creative!
languages.简体中文:
进度来源为0到100之间的百分比或0.0到1.0之
间的浮点数，具体取决于进度值模式。
进度来源支持占位符，因此没有什么可以阻止
您发挥创意！
languages.繁體中文:
The progress source is the current progress
as percentage number between 0 and 100 or
floating point number between 0.0 and 1.0,
depending on the progress value mode.
The source supports placeholders, so there's
nothing that holds you from getting creative!

languages.简体中文:
Mojang实施许多方法来帮助保护儿童及其隐私权，包括履行《儿童在线隐私权保护法案》（COPPA）与《通用数据保护条例》（GDPR）。

在取得Realms账户访问权之前，你可能需要获得父母的同意。
languages.繁體中文:
Mojang 為了保護兒童及其隱私權施行了許多政策，包含《兒童線上隱私保護法》(COPPA) 與《一般資料保護規則》(GDPR)。

您在存取 Realms 帳號之前可能需要取得家長的同意。

languages.简体中文:
当原理图粘贴时，方块的替换方式
这将会允许直接改变重叠的位置，
而不需要后面处理的位置总是先用空气覆盖前面的位置。
另一方面，一些像光照方块这样的方块被认为是空气，
所以它们需要“All”替换行为来放置。

key:
The block replace behavior when adding blocks
to the schematic world.

This allows using overlapped placements without the
later handled placement always ovewriting earlier ones with air.
On the other hand some blocks like light blocks are considered
to be air, so they would need the "All" replace behavior
to get placed at all.

languages.English: You are trying to teleport to a map that is not connected to the current confirmed/auto one. If you are sure that this map is from your current sub-server/world save, then you can enable teleportation by adding a connection in the map selection screen -> Connect. languages.English:
The screen depth at which in-world waypoints stop getting smaller when you go further away from them. 
 Use this if you want to make waypoints that are far away bigger/smaller on the screen. Use the "Waypoint In-World Scale" setting to also affect the size of waypoints when you are close to them. 
 
 For the "Auto" option, go all the way to the left. 
 The automatic option attempts to give you the best value for the default values of scale types, taking your FOV and screen height into account. 
 
 Default values in older mod versions: 
 Clamp Depth: 12 
 In-World Scale: 2.5 
 Name Text Scale: 0.5 
 Distance Text Scale: 0.8
languages.简体中文:
当你远离它们时，游戏内路径点停止变小的屏幕深度。 
 如果你想在屏幕上使远处的路径点变大/变小，请使用此选项。使用“游戏内路径点缩放”设置也可以在你靠近它们时影响路径点的大小。 
 
 对于“自动”选项，一直拉到到左边。 
 自动选项会同时考虑你的 FOV 和屏幕高度，尝试为你提供最佳的缩放默认值，。 
 
 旧模组版本中的默认值： 
 深度限制：12 
 游戏内缩放：2.5 
 名称文本缩放：0.5 
 距离文本缩放：0.8
languages.繁體中文:
The screen depth at which in-world waypoints stop getting smaller when you go further away from them. 
 Use this if you want to make waypoints that are far away bigger/smaller on the screen. Use the "Waypoint In-World Scale" setting to also affect the size of waypoints when you are close to them. 
 
 For the "Auto" option, go all the way to the left. 
 The automatic option attempts to give you the best value for the default values of scale types, taking your FOV and screen height into account. 
 
 Default values in older mod versions: 
 Clamp Depth: 12 
 In-World Scale: 2.5 
 Name Text Scale: 0.5 
 Distance Text Scale: 0.8

languages.English: Torches, primed TNT, droppers, dispensers, end portals, brewing stands, monster spawners, furnaces, ghast fireballs, wither skulls, taming, withers, lava (when raining), placing an eye of ender in an end portal frame, redstone torches burning out, food items on campfire.
languages.简体中文: 火把、点燃的 TNT、漏斗、发射器、末地传送门、酿造台、刷怪笼、熔炉、恶魂火球、凋灵之首、驯服、凋灵、熔岩（下雨时）、在末地传送门上放置末影之眼、红石火把熄灭 ，营火上的食物。
languages.繁體中文: 火把、點燃的 TNT、漏斗、發射器、終界傳送門、釀造台、生怪磚、熔爐、地獄幽靈火球、凋零頭顱、凋零怪、熔岩（雨中）、營火上的食物、紅石火把熄滅、往終界傳送門框架上放置終界之眼、馴服生物產生的粒子。

languages.English: A single pixel on the map can contain multiple transparent layers and an opaque block under them. In older non-cache map data files, only the Y level (height) of the opaque block is stored in such cases, which often makes it unsafe to blindly teleport to the stored Y coordinate. When this setting is ON, the mod treats such map pixels as it would undiscovered chunks. It defaults to 2D waypoints and disables direct teleportation to such pixels. Disable this at your own risk!
languages.简体中文: A single pixel on the map can contain multiple transparent layers and an opaque block under them. In older non-cache map data files, only the Y level (height) of the opaque block is stored in such cases, which often makes it unsafe to blindly teleport to the stored Y coordinate. When this setting is ON, the mod treats such map pixels as it would undiscovered chunks. It defaults to 2D waypoints and disables direct teleportation to such pixels. Disable this at your own risk!
languages.繁體中文: A single pixel on the map can contain multiple transparent layers and an opaque block under them. In older non-cache map data files, only the Y level (height) of the opaque block is stored in such cases, which often makes it unsafe to blindly teleport to the stored Y coordinate. When this setting is ON, the mod treats such map pixels as it would undiscovered chunks. It defaults to 2D waypoints and disables direct teleportation to such pixels. Disable this at your own risk!

languages.English: All versions. Moves resource pack and data pack reloading to a dedicated worker pool instead of using the default `Worker-Main` threads. This allows mods to Smooth Boot to still potentially improve singleplayer performance at runtime while not slowing down launch due to a limited thread count.
languages.简体中文: 全版本共有。将资源包和数据包的重载任务转移到一个专门的工作线程上，而不是使用默认的主工作线程。这让流畅加载（Smooth Boot）模组在运行时仍然可能提高单人游戏的性能，同时不会因为线程数量限制减慢启动速度。
languages.繁體中文: 所有版本。將資源包和資料包的重新載入移到專用的工作池，而不是使用預設的 `Worker-Main` 執行緒。這允許模組在執行時仍然有可能改善單人遊戲的效能，同時不會因為有限的執行緒數量而減慢啟動速度。

Failed to open screen!

FancyMenu failed to open the given screen via the 'Open Screen' action!
In most cases this means the screen is not supported by FancyMenu,

If the screen is a Vanilla screen, please report this bug via GitHub.

languages.English: Warning: The Schematic Version Control System is currently hidden. In general you should NOT use this, unless you really know how it works and changes some of the mod behavior. languages.English:
When rendering in 2D, this option allows Modern UI to exactly compute font size in device-space from the current coordinate transform matrix.
This provides perfect text rendering for scaling-down texts in vanilla, but may increase GPU memory usage.
When disabled, Modern UI will use SDF text rendering if appropriate.
This option only applies to outline fonts.
languages.简体中文:
在2D渲染中，该选项允许 Modern UI 从当前的坐标变换矩阵中精确计算设备空间中的字体大小。
这能在原版中对缩小的文字提供完美渲染，但会增加显存占用。
禁用时，如果合适，Modern UI 会使用SDF文字渲染。
该选项只适用于轮廓字体。
languages.繁體中文:
在 2D 繪製時，此選項允許 Modern UI 從目前坐標變換矩陣中準確計算裝置空間的字型大小。
這為縮小文字在原版中的呈現提供了完美的支援，但可能增加顯示卡記憶體使用量。
停用時，Modern UI 將在適當的情況下使用 SDF 文字繪製。
此選項僅適用於輪廓字型。

languages.English:
(This was called Schematic Projects before.)
In general you §6should not§r be using this feature,
unless you really know how it works and what it does.
It somewhat changes how the area selections, placements and pasting works,
in particular that there is also an area delete operation when pasting.

Basically this feature is intended for §6iterative, in-place§r design work,
and it allows you to easier create multiple versions/snapshots
of the same build, and also to switch between the versions by deleting what is
in the world first, and then pasting the next version in its place.

languages.English:
When you enable the template mode for a custom button, it will apply
some of its settings to all other buttons or sliders in the current screen.

Template buttons will be §linvisible§r outside the editor.

When you set the template to share settings with sliders, the
settings for the button textures will change to slider texture settings.

§lSettings that get shared are:

- Button/Slider Textures
- Button Click Sounds
- Button/Slider Hover Sounds
- Button/Slider Position (if enabled)
- Button/Slider Size (if enabled)
- Button/Slider Opacity (if enabled)
- Button/Slider Visibility (if enabled)
- Button/Slider Label (if enabled)

languages.English:
Returns the last world or server the player joined.
You can control via the 'type' value if the placeholder
should return both servers and worlds or only one of them.

Types: both, world, server

The 'full_world_path' value controls if the full path or
only the name of the world (not server) should get returned.
Setting this to 'false' will only return the world name.

languages.English:
If enabled every server and uniquely named world will have their own locked slots.

1.如果你把所有的世界都命名为"新的世界"，它们将共享同一个锁定槽位。

如果啟用，每個伺服器和唯一命名的世界將擁有獨立的鎖定欄位。

languages.English:
Modern Text Engine provides high-quality text rendering, resolution-independent outline fonts, color emojis, and proper Unicode text and layout support for Minecraft.
This is an extension to Minecraft, Modern UI itself is not affected by this option.
languages.简体中文:
现代化文本引擎为 Minecraft 提供高质量文本渲染、分辨率无关轮廓字体、彩色表情符号、以及正确的 Unicode 文本处理和布局支持。
这是对 Minecraft 的扩展支持，Modern UI 自身不受该选项影响。
languages.繁體中文:
現代文字引擎提供高品質的文字繪製、解析度獨立的輪廓字型、彩色表情圖案，以及對 Minecraft 的正確 Unicode 文字和版面支援。
這是 Minecraft 的擴充，Modern UI 本身不受此選項影響。

languages.English: All versions. Memoizes the `RenderMaterial` (texture) collection and dependency list that models return instead of requiring them to be recalculated on each request. Helps accelerate the model load/bake process.
languages.简体中文: 全版本共有。模型会返回§bRenderMaterial§r（纹理）的集合和依赖项列表，现在游戏会记忆它们，而不是要求它们在每次请求中都重新计算一次。这有助于加速模型加载/烘焙的进程。
languages.繁體中文: 所有版本。對 `RenderMaterial`(紋理)集合和模型返回的相依清單進行記錄，而不是需要在每次請求時重新計算它們。有助於加速模型載入和烘焙過程。

languages.简体中文:
该功能绕过了1.18.2中新添加的距离/坐标校验。
该校验破坏了“精确放置协议”的功能
并导致任何带有旋转(或其他属性)
请求放置的方块变成了幽灵方块
基本上没有必要禁用这个校验。
因为在1.18.2之前，这个校验甚至都不存在

key:
Bypass the new distance/coordinate check that was added in 1.18.2.

That check breaks the "accurate placement protocol" and causes
any blocks placed with a rotation (or other property) request to just become ghost blocks.

There is basically no need to ever disable this.
The check didn't even exist ever before 1.18.2.

languages.English:
Dialog System Command Help:
/dialog <entity_selector> show <player> <dialog_id> - Make specified entity show dialog to specified player

/dialog list - List all available dialogs

Dialog System Command Help:

languages.English:
Adjusts the fog effect distance on the terrain per dimension. Disable Multi Dimension Fog to control fog using Single Fog 
0 - use vanilla fog settings
1-32 - set fog distance in chunks
33 - max fog distance (essentially disables fog)
languages.简体中文:
调整此维度的地形迷雾效果距离。禁用多维度迷雾来控制全局迷雾。
0 - 使用原版迷雾设置
1-32 - 以区块为单位设置迷雾距离
33 - 最大迷雾距离（基本上等于禁用迷雾）
languages.繁體中文:
調整每個維度的地形迷霧效果距離。停用多重維度迷霧來使用全域迷霧控制設定 
0 - 使用原版迷霧設定
1-32 - 以區塊為單位設定迷霧距離
33 - 最大迷霧距離（實質上是關閉了迷霧）

languages.English:
Each dialog line can trigger sound effects and execute commands.
Dialog text supports translation keys, formatting, and placeholders.
Examples: §1Col§2or§3ed §4Text, §f§lBold, §oItalic§r. @@s refers to the current player's name: @s.
languages.简体中文:
每进入一句对话都可以播放音效和执行指令。
对话框文本支持翻译键、格式化和一些占位符。
如§1彩§2色§3文§4本、§f§l粗体、§o斜体§r，<ruby 10 那怎么显示@@s的呢？你猜>@@s指代当前玩家名字：@s。
languages.繁體中文:
Each dialog line can trigger sound effects and execute commands.
Dialog text supports translation keys, formatting, and placeholders.
Examples: §1Col§2or§3ed §4Text, §f§lBold, §oItalic§r. @@s refers to the current player's name: @s.
