languages.繁體中文: Options support locking, hiding, dialog jumping, hover tooltips, and can also execute commands.

languages.English: This mod uses datapacks to store dialog content, offering high configuration freedom. Every element you see in this interface can be modified via datapacks.
languages.简体中文: 本模组使用数据包存储对话内容，配置的自由度极高，你在这个界面看到的所有元素全部可以通过数据包修改。
languages.繁體中文: This mod uses datapacks to store dialog content, offering high configuration freedom. Every element you see in this interface can be modified via datapacks.

languages.English:
The dialog box has two modes.
1. Screen Mode: Players can interact with the dialog using the mouse, but cannot perform other in-game actions.
2. Render Layer Mode: <ruby 48 though many dialog interactions are unavailable>Players can perform most normal gameplay actions, making it more suitable for adventure scenarios.
languages.简体中文:
对话框有两种模式。
一是屏幕模式，玩家可以用鼠标与对话框交互，但是无法进行其他游戏操作。
二是渲染层模式，<ruby 16 当然很多对话框的交互就没有了>玩家可以正常进行绝大部分游戏操作，更适合冒险情景。
languages.繁體中文:
The dialog box has two modes.
1. Screen Mode: Players can interact with the dialog using the mouse, but cannot perform other in-game actions.
2. Render Layer Mode: <ruby 48 though many dialog interactions are unavailable>Players can perform most normal gameplay actions, making it more suitable for adventure scenarios.

languages.English:
Ciallo～(∠・ω< )⌒☆ @s, welcome to the ChatBox mod!

Ciallo～(∠・ω< )⌒☆ @s，欢迎使用对话框模组。
这是一款为地图和整合包制作者设计的对话框模组，旨在让玩家能在mc中有如<ruby 4 galgame>视觉小说般的沉浸式对话体验。
languages.繁體中文:
Ciallo～(∠・ω< )⌒☆ @s, welcome to the ChatBox mod!
This dialog system is designed for map and modpack creators, aiming to provide players with an immersive, <ruby 12 galgame>visual-novel-like conversation experience in Minecraft.

key:
If enabled, then Litematica handles the so called
"Carpet mod Accurate Placement Protocol" itself in single player.
If you also have Tweakeroo installed, then this can be disabled,
as Tweakeroo's 'clientPlacementRotation' option does the exact same thing.

Advanced sizes support placeholders,
so you can calculate sizes
by using the Calculator placeholder,
get sizes of other elements
and much more.

Many useful placeholders for element
sizing can be found
in the "GUI" and "Advanced"
placeholder categories.

§xYou will not be able to resize
§xthe element on axes that got
§xoverridden by an advanced size.
languages.简体中文:
§x仅适用于高级用户！

允许您手动设置元素尺寸。

高级坐标支持占位符，因此您可以使用计算
器占位符计算位置，或获取其他元素位置等。

许多有用的元素坐标占位符可以在“GUI”和
“高级”占位符类别中找到。

§x您无法调整由高级尺寸覆写的同轴元素尺寸。

languages.English:
An invisible box around the vanilla potion effects display that pushes the mod's interfaces out of the way. 
 
 Normal type's collision box is equal to its size and only pushes interfaces by the necessary distance. 
 
 Screen Height type's collision box is stretched across the whole screen height and always shifts colliding interfaces vertically by the Normal type's height. This can be very useful when you have multiple interfaces in a column and want all of them to be pushed.
languages.简体中文:
原版药水效果状态栏周围有一个隐形碰撞箱将模组的界面推开。 
 
 正常类型的碰撞箱等于它的大小，并且只将界面推开必要的距离。 
 
 屏幕高度类型的碰撞箱拉伸到整个屏幕高度，并且总是以正常类型的高度垂直移动碰撞的界面。 当你在一列中有多个界面并希望所有这些界面都被推开时，这将非常有用。
languages.繁體中文:
An invisible box around the vanilla potion effects display that pushes the mod's interfaces out of the way. 
 
 Normal type's collision box is equal to its size and only pushes interfaces by the necessary distance. 
 
 Screen Height type's collision box is stretched across the whole screen height and always shifts colliding interfaces vertically by the Normal type's height. This can be very useful when you have multiple interfaces in a column and want all of them to be pushed.

languages.English:
LivingAttackEvent is fired when a living Entity is attacked. 
This event is fired whenever an Entity is attacked in LivingEntity. hurt(DamageSource, float) and Player. hurt(DamageSource, float).  
This event is fired via the ForgeHooks. onLivingAttack(LivingEntity, DamageSource, float).  source contains the DamageSource of the attack. amount contains the amount of damage dealt to the entity. 
This event is Cancelable. If this event is canceled, the Entity does not take attack damage. 
This event does not have a result net.minecraftforge.eventbus.api.Event.HasResult  
This event is fired on the MinecraftForge.EVENT_BUS.
languages.简体中文:
LivingAttackEvent is fired when a living Entity is attacked.

This event is fired via the ForgeHooks. onLivingAttack(LivingEntity, DamageSource, float).  source contains the DamageSource of the attack. amount contains the amount of damage dealt to the entity. 
This event is Cancelable. If this event is canceled, the Entity does not take attack damage. 
This event does not have a result net.minecraftforge.eventbus.api.Event.HasResult  
This event is fired on the MinecraftForge.EVENT_BUS.
languages.繁體中文:

This event is Cancelable. If this event is canceled, the Entity does not take attack damage. 
This event does not have a result net.minecraftforge.eventbus.api.Event.HasResult  
This event is fired on the MinecraftForge.EVENT_BUS.

languages.English:
Render the entities over the minimap frame instead of rendering them inside the frame. Entities rendered this way act similarly to the waypoints and stick to the border when out of bounds. Visible entities are still limited to the ones loaded on the game client side though. 
 
 Option "Player List" - render over minimap only when the "List Players" key binding (TAB by default) is pressed.
languages.简体中文:
允许在小地图边框上渲染实体，而不只是在边框内渲染它们。 以这种方式渲染的实体的行为类似于路径点，并且在超出边界时会粘在边界上。 可见实体仍然仅限于游戏客户端加载的实体。 
 
 选项“玩家列表” - 仅当按下“玩家列表”键绑定（默认为 TAB）时才在小地图上如此渲染。
languages.繁體中文:
Render the entities over the minimap frame instead of rendering them inside the frame. Entities rendered this way act similarly to the waypoints and stick to the border when out of bounds. Visible entities are still limited to the ones loaded on the game client side though. 
 
 Option "Player List" - render over minimap only when the "List Players" key binding (TAB by default) is pressed.

languages.English:
This matches CSS line-break property.
Auto: Depends on Locale settings, it may be Normal or Strict.
Loose: Uses the least restrictive rule for line-breaking. Typically used for short lines.
Normal: Indicates breaking text with the most common set of line-breaking rules.
Strict: Indicates breaking text with the most stringent line-breaking rules.
languages.简体中文:
这与 CSS line-break 属性相吻合。
Auto：取决于区域设置，可能是 Normal 或 Strict。
Loose：对换行使用限制最小的规则，通常用于短行。
Normal：表示使用最常用的换行规则集分隔文本.
Strict: 表示使用最严格的换行规则。
languages.繁體中文:
這與 CSS 的換行屬性相匹配。
自動：取決於區域設定，可能是正常或嚴格。
寬鬆：使用最不限制的換行規則。通常用於短行。
正常：指示使用最常見的換行規則來斷開文字。
嚴格：指示使用最嚴格的換行規則來斷開文字。

languages.English: Fixes MC-272431, which tracks the ender dragon being unable to dive to the portal as it did in 1.13 and older. This causes the dragon to fly quite a bit differently from what modern players are used to and also patches out one-cycling, so it's not enabled by default. Thanks to Jukitsu for identifying the regression in the vanilla code.
languages.简体中文: Fixes MC-272431, which tracks the ender dragon being unable to dive to the portal as it did in 1.13 and older. This causes the dragon to fly quite a bit differently from what modern players are used to and also patches out one-cycling, so it's not enabled by default. Thanks to Jukitsu for identifying the regression in the vanilla code.
languages.繁體中文: 修復了 MC-272431，該修復了終界龍無法像 1.13 及更早版本那樣降落到傳送門上的問題。這導致終界龍的飛行方式與現代玩家習慣的飛行方式大相徑庭，同時也修正了單循環功能，因此默認情況下不會啟用該功能。感謝 Jukitsu 發現了原版代碼中的回歸。

languages.English:
The layout index is useful when you have
multiple layouts active for the same screen.
If these layouts need to get loaded
in a specific order, use the layout index.
The bigger the index, the later the layout
gets loaded, which means it is ON TOP OF
layouts with a smaller index.

For example: A layout with index 1 will
be under a layout with index 2.
languages.简体中文:
布局索引在同一屏幕上有多个布局
同时启用时很有用。
如果这些布局需要按特定顺序加载，
可以使用布局索引。
索引值越大，加载顺序越靠后，
意味着它会覆盖索引值较小的布局。

例如：索引为 1 的布局将会
位于索引为 2 的布局下方。
languages.繁體中文:
The layout index is useful when you have
multiple layouts active for the same screen.
If these layouts need to get loaded
in a specific order, use the layout index.
The bigger the index, the later the layout
gets loaded, which means it is ON TOP OF
layouts with a smaller index.

For example: A layout with index 1 will
be under a layout with index 2.

languages.English:
Mojang implements certain procedures to help protect children and their privacy including complying with the Children’s Online Privacy Protection Act (COPPA) and General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).

You may need to obtain parental consent before accessing your Realms account.

If you have an older Minecraft account (you log in with your username), you need to migrate the account to a Mojang account in order to access Realms.
languages.简体中文:
Mojang实施许多方法来促进儿童及其隐私权的保护，包括履行《儿童在线隐私权保护法案》（COPPA）与《通用数据保护条例》（GDPR）。

在访问你的Realms账户之前，你可能需要征得父母的同意。

如果你拥有的是旧版的Minecraft账户（登录时使用用户名），你需要将其合并到Mojang账户以访问Realms。
languages.繁體中文:
Mojang 為了保護兒童及其隱私權施行了許多政策，包含《兒童線上隱私保護法》(COPPA) 與《一般資料保護規則》(GDPR)。

您在存取 Realms 帳號之前可能需要取得家長的同意。

如果您擁有較舊的 Minecraft 帳號（以使用者名稱登入），您必須將帳號轉移為 Mojang 帳號以使用 Realms。

languages.English: This option fixes a deadlock that can occur if an exception is thrown while processing entity data. Vanilla does not correctly unlock the data manager when it should. This is tracked as MC-218112 on the bug tracker, and was fixed by Mojang in 1.17.
languages.简体中文: 在处理实体数据时抛出异常可能导致死锁，此项修复了这个问题。原版在应该解锁数据管理器的时候却不能正常解锁。问题追踪器链接：MC-218112，由Mojang在1.17中修复。
languages.繁體中文: 此選項修復了在處理實體資料時發生的當一個異常抛出時可能發生的死鎖。原版在應該解鎖資料管理員時並未正確解鎖。這在錯誤追蹤器上被追蹤為 MC-218112，並且在 1.17 中由 Mojang 修復。

languages.English:
The maximum number of client ticks to wait for the server to send the content of the player inventory. 
If locked slots get items moved out/thrown away on dimension change you need to increase this value.
This often happens on servers under heavy load.
NOTE: 20 ticks are equivalent of 1 second.
§l§cWARNING§r: Setting this too high MAY lead to locked slot management not working properly until this timeout expires.
languages.简体中文:
等待服务器发送玩家物品栏内容的最大客户端时间(ticks)
如果锁定槽位在维度改变时物品被移出/丢出，则需要增大这个值。
这种情况经常发生在负载过重的服务器上。
注意：20 ticks相当于1秒。
§l§c警告§r：设置过高的值可能会导致锁定槽位无法正常工作，直到超时。
languages.繁體中文:
等待伺服器傳送玩家物品欄內容的最大使用者端時間(ticks)
如果鎖定欄位在維度改變時物品被移出/丟出，則需要增大這個值。
這種情況經常發生在負載過重的伺服器上。
注意：20 ticks相當於1秒。
§l§c警告§r：設定過高的值可能會導致鎖定欄位無法正常工作，直到超時。
%s，位於 %s, %s, %s（相對位置：%s, %s, %s），時間為 %s 刻

languages.English:
LivingHealEvent is fired when an Entity is set to be healed. This event is fired whenever an Entity is healed in LivingEntity.heal(float) 
This event is fired via the ForgeEventFactory.onLivingHeal(LivingEntity, float).amount contains the amount of healing done to the Entity that was healed. 
This event is Cancelable. If this event is canceled, the Entity is not healed. 
This event does not have a result net.minecraftforge.eventbus.api.Event.HasResult  
This event is fired on the MinecraftForge.EVENT_BUS.
languages.简体中文:
LivingHealEvent is fired when an Entity is set to be healed. This event is fired whenever an Entity is healed in LivingEntity.heal(float) 
This event is fired via the ForgeEventFactory.onLivingHeal(LivingEntity, float).amount contains the amount of healing done to the Entity that was healed. 
This event is Cancelable. If this event is canceled, the Entity is not healed. 
This event does not have a result net.minecraftforge.eventbus.api.Event.HasResult  
This event is fired on the MinecraftForge.EVENT_BUS.
languages.繁體中文:
LivingHealEvent is fired when an Entity is set to be healed. This event is fired whenever an Entity is healed in LivingEntity.heal(float) 
This event is fired via the ForgeEventFactory.onLivingHeal(LivingEntity, float).amount contains the amount of healing done to the Entity that was healed. 
This event is Cancelable. If this event is canceled, the Entity is not healed. 
This event does not have a result net.minecraftforge.eventbus.api.Event.HasResult  
This event is fired on the MinecraftForge.EVENT_BUS.

Matches a value against multiple cases and returns the corresponding result.
Format: value to match, case pairs (value:result) separated by commas, optional default case.
Example: value="1", cases="1:first,2:second", default="none"

匹配值并返回对应的结果。

languages.繁體中文:
Matches a value against multiple cases and returns the corresponding result.
Format: value to match, case pairs (value:result) separated by commas, optional default case.
Example: value="1", cases="1:first,2:second", default="none"

languages.English:
The graphics engine of Modern UI has been disabled due to the failure of OpenGL 4.5 core or ARB capability test. This means that all GUIs provided by Modern UI will not be rendered or drawn. However, the text engine, smooth scrolling, GUI scale slider option, blur background, game loading ding sound, inventory screen pause and other functions provided by Modern UI Forge extension are still available.
GPU: %s, OpenGL: %s. The following ARB extensions are required: %s
For Windows and Linux, first update your GPU drivers. If you have integrated GPU, run Java applications with dedicated GPU. For macOS or in other cases, click OK for help.
languages.简体中文:
由于 OpenGL 4.5 core 或其 ARB capability 测试失败，Modern UI 的图形引擎已被禁用。这意味着所有由 Modern UI 原生提供的GUI将不会渲染或绘制。然而，由 Modern UI Forge 扩展所提供的文本引擎、平滑滚动、GUI比例滑块选项、虚化背景、游戏加载叮音效、物品栏界面暂停等其他功能仍然可用。
显卡: %s, OpenGL: %s. 下列 ARB 扩展是必须的: %s
对于 Windows 和 Linux，首先更新你的显卡驱动。如果你有核显，请使用独显运行 Java 应用。对于 macOS 或其他情况，点击 OK 寻求帮助
languages.繁體中文:
由於 OpenGL 4.5 核心或 ARB 能力測試失敗，Modern UI 圖形引擎已停用。這表示所有由 Modern UI 提供的介面將不會呈現或繪製。但是，Modern UI Forge 擴展提供的文字引擎、平滑捲動、介面比例滑桿選項、模糊背景、遊戲載入音效、物品欄畫面暫停等功能仍然可用。
顯示卡：%s，OpenGL：%s。需要下列 ARB 擴展： %s
對於 Windows 和 Linux，請先更新顯示卡驅動程式。如果你使用整合顯示卡，請使用專用顯示卡執行 Java 應用程式。對於 macOS 或其他情況，點擊「確定」以取得說明。

languages.English:
Check if a text matches another.

Compare Modes:
equals, contains, starts-with, ends-with

Set the 3 dots after the 'mode' variable
to the compare mode you want to use.

Set the 3 dots after the 'text' variable
to the text you want to check.

Set the 3 dots after the 'compare_with'
variable to the text you want to
compare the first one with.

§xYou can check for multiple texts/modes
§xat once by separating multiple
§xcompare sections by comma.
languages.简体中文:
检查文本是否与另一个文本匹配。

比较模式：
equals（等于）、contains（包含）、
starts-with（开头为）、ends-with（结尾为）

将“mode”变量后面的3个点设置为您要
使用的比较模式。

将“text”变量后面的3个点设置为您要检
查的文本。

将“compare_with”变量后面的3个点设置
为要与第一个文本进行比较的文本。

§x您可以通过用逗号分隔来一次性检查多个
§x文本/模式。
languages.繁體中文:
Check if a text matches another.

Compare Modes:
equals, contains, starts-with, ends-with

Set the 3 dots after the 'mode' variable
to the compare mode you want to use.

Set the 3 dots after the 'text' variable
to the text you want to check.

Set the 3 dots after the 'compare_with'
variable to the text you want to
compare the first one with.

§xYou can check for multiple texts/modes
§xat once by separating multiple
§xcompare sections by comma.

languages.English:
LivingDeathEvent is fired when an Entity dies. This event is fired whenever an Entity dies in LivingEntity.die(DamageSource), Player.die(DamageSource), and ServerPlayer.die(DamageSource).  
This event is fired via the ForgeHooks.onLivingDeath(LivingEntity, DamageSource).source contains the DamageSource that caused the entity to die. 
This event is Cancelable. If this event is canceled, the Entity does not die. 
This event does not have a result net.minecraftforge.eventbus.api.Event.HasResult  
This event is fired on the MinecraftForge.EVENT_BUS.
languages.简体中文:
LivingDeathEvent is fired when an Entity dies. This event is fired whenever an Entity dies in LivingEntity.die(DamageSource), Player.die(DamageSource), and ServerPlayer.die(DamageSource).  
This event is fired via the ForgeHooks.onLivingDeath(LivingEntity, DamageSource).source contains the DamageSource that caused the entity to die. 
This event is Cancelable. If this event is canceled, the Entity does not die. 
This event does not have a result net.minecraftforge.eventbus.api.Event.HasResult  
This event is fired on the MinecraftForge.EVENT_BUS.
languages.繁體中文:
LivingDeathEvent is fired when an Entity dies. This event is fired whenever an Entity dies in LivingEntity.die(DamageSource), Player.die(DamageSource), and ServerPlayer.die(DamageSource).  
This event is fired via the ForgeHooks.onLivingDeath(LivingEntity, DamageSource).source contains the DamageSource that caused the entity to die. 
This event is Cancelable. If this event is canceled, the Entity does not die. 
This event does not have a result net.minecraftforge.eventbus.api.Event.HasResult  
This event is fired on the MinecraftForge.EVENT_BUS.

languages.English:
Failed to mimic button!

FancyMenu failed to mimic the click action of a button.
In most cases this means FancyMenu failed to open the original screen
this button is part of, because the screen is not supported.
Most unsupported screens are non-Vanilla screens from other mods.

If the screen is a Vanilla screen, please report this bug via GitHub.
languages.简体中文:
模仿按钮失败！

FancyMenu 未能模仿按钮的点击操作。
在大多数情况下，这意味着 FancyMenu 未能打开
该按钮所属的原始屏幕，因为该屏幕不受支持。
大多数不受支持的屏幕都是来自其他模组的非原版屏幕。

如果该屏幕是原版屏幕，请通过 GitHub 报告此错误。
languages.繁體中文:
Failed to mimic button!

FancyMenu failed to mimic the click action of a button.
In most cases this means FancyMenu failed to open the original screen
this button is part of, because the screen is not supported.
Most unsupported screens are non-Vanilla screens from other mods.

If the screen is a Vanilla screen, please report this bug via GitHub.

languages.English:
In this mode, the element's position will get calculated
in a different way than normal.

This mode makes the element always keep the exact same distance
to its anchor, no matter the current size of the element.
This means the size of the element can dynamically change
without it moving away or getting closer to its anchor.
While this can be useful in some situations, there
are also cases where this behaviour is not optimal.

§xThis has NO EFFECT when using another element as anchor!
languages.简体中文:
在此模式下，元素的位置计算方式
与正常模式不同。

此模式使元素始终保持与锚点相同的距离，
无论元素当前大小如何变化。
这意味着元素大小可以动态变化，
但不会远离或靠近锚点。
虽然这在某些情况下很有用，
但也可能存在不适用的情况。

§x当使用其他元素作为锚点时，此功能无效！
languages.繁體中文:
In this mode, the element's position will get calculated
in a different way than normal.

This mode makes the element always keep the exact same distance
to its anchor, no matter the current size of the element.
This means the size of the element can dynamically change
without it moving away or getting closer to its anchor.
While this can be useful in some situations, there
are also cases where this behaviour is not optimal.

§xThis has NO EFFECT when using another element as anchor!

languages.English:
Since 1.19.3 "Creative Menu" have changed. And there are multiple possible interpretations of: "Sorted like the Creative Menu".

IPN now supports 2 way of ordering:
1. Like in the search tab
2. You can define category priority.
languages.简体中文:
自1.19.3“创造菜单”已经改变。而且有多种可能的解释：“像创造菜单一样排序”。

IPN现在支持2种排序方式：
1.像在搜索标签页
2.你可以自定义类别优先级。
languages.繁體中文: 從 1.19.3 開始，「創造模式選單」發生了變化。並且有多種可能的解釋：「像創造模式選單一樣排序」。

languages.English: Loading worlds from folders with symbolic links can be unsafe if you don't know exactly what you are doing. Please visit %s to learn more.
languages.简体中文: 从含有符号链接的文件夹中加载世界可能导致风险，尤其是在你不清楚链接目标内容时。请访问%s了解更多信息。
languages.繁體中文: 繼續操作前請知悉，從包含符號連結的資料夾中載入世界可能會有風險。請前往 %s 了解更多資訊。

languages.English: All versions. Reduces log spam and possibly slightly improves loading speed by not printing the stacktraces for some commonly thrown exceptions during datapack reload (e.g. missing items in loot tables/recipes). The message is still printed.
languages.简体中文: 全版本共有。数据包重载过程中不再打印一些常见异常（如战利品表/配方中的物品丢失）的堆栈跟踪，减少日志刷屏，且可能稍微提高了启动速度。只是不打印堆栈，一条异常消息依然会被打印出来。
languages.繁體中文: 所有版本。透過不輸出資料包重新載入期間(如戰利品表、配方中缺少物品)某些常見拋出例外的堆疊追蹤，減少記錄檔洗版，可能稍微提高載入速度。仍然會輸出相同訊息。

languages.English:
LivingKnockBackEvent is fired when a living entity is about to be knocked back. This event is fired whenever an Entity is knocked back in LivingEntity.hurt(DamageSource, float), LivingEntity#blockUsingShield(LivingEntity), Mob.doHurtTarget(Entity) and Player.attack(Entity) 
This event is fired via ForgeHooks.onLivingKnockBack(LivingEntity, float, double, double).strength contains the strength of the knock back. ratioX contains the x ratio of the knock back. ratioZ contains the z ratio of the knock back. 
This event is Cancelable. If this event is canceled, the entity is not knocked back. 
This event does not have a result. net.minecraftforge.eventbus.api.Event.HasResult  
This event is fired on the MinecraftForge.EVENT_BUS.
languages.简体中文:
LivingKnockBackEvent is fired when a living entity is about to be knocked back. This event is fired whenever an Entity is knocked back in LivingEntity.hurt(DamageSource, float), LivingEntity#blockUsingShield(LivingEntity), Mob.doHurtTarget(Entity) and Player.attack(Entity) 
This event is fired via ForgeHooks.onLivingKnockBack(LivingEntity, float, double, double).strength contains the strength of the knock back. ratioX contains the x ratio of the knock back. ratioZ contains the z ratio of the knock back. 
This event is Cancelable. If this event is canceled, the entity is not knocked back. 
This event does not have a result. net.minecraftforge.eventbus.api.Event.HasResult  
This event is fired on the MinecraftForge.EVENT_BUS.
languages.繁體中文:
LivingKnockBackEvent is fired when a living entity is about to be knocked back. This event is fired whenever an Entity is knocked back in LivingEntity.hurt(DamageSource, float), LivingEntity#blockUsingShield(LivingEntity), Mob.doHurtTarget(Entity) and Player.attack(Entity) 
This event is fired via ForgeHooks.onLivingKnockBack(LivingEntity, float, double, double).strength contains the strength of the knock back. ratioX contains the x ratio of the knock back. ratioZ contains the z ratio of the knock back. 
This event is Cancelable. If this event is canceled, the entity is not knocked back. 
This event does not have a result. net.minecraftforge.eventbus.api.Event.HasResult  
This event is fired on the MinecraftForge.EVENT_BUS.

languages.English: This section stores the previous few chapters you've visited.$(br2)Chapters are automatically added and removed as you browse through the book. Should you wish to keep them referenced for longer, you may bookmark them. $(br2)$(o)Tip: Try shift-clicking a chapter button!$()
languages.简体中文: 在这里你可以查看你的浏览历史。$(br2)你浏览过的本书的每一个章节都会自动追踪，过于久远的浏览记录也会自动清除。你可以将你需要的章节加入书签，以供不时之需。$(br2)$(o)提示：可直接按住 Shift 点击某一章节以快速添加书签！$()
languages.繁體中文: This section stores the previous few chapters you've visited.$(br2)Chapters are automatically added and removed as you browse through the book. Should you wish to keep them referenced for longer, you may bookmark them. $(br2)$(o)Tip: Try shift-clicking a chapter button!$()

languages.English:
PlayerEvent is fired whenever an event involving a Player occurs. 
If a method utilizes this net.minecraftforge.eventbus.api.Event as its parameter, the method will receive every child event of this class. 
All children of this event are fired on the MinecraftForge.EVENT_BUS.
languages.简体中文:
PlayerEvent is fired whenever an event involving a Player occurs. 
If a method utilizes this net.minecraftforge.eventbus.api.Event as its parameter, the method will receive every child event of this class. 
All children of this event are fired on the MinecraftForge.EVENT_BUS.
languages.繁體中文:
PlayerEvent is fired whenever an event involving a Player occurs. 
If a method utilizes this net.minecraftforge.eventbus.api.Event as its parameter, the method will receive every child event of this class. 
All children of this event are fired on the MinecraftForge.EVENT_BUS.

languages.English: Nothing changed. That's already the name of this bossbar
languages.简体中文: 无变化，这本就是这个Boss栏的名称
languages.繁體中文: 未進行任何變更。此 Boss 狀態條已經是該名稱

languages.English: Lava blocks nearby will freeze into obsidian.
languages.简体中文: Lava blocks nearby will freeze into obsidian.
languages.繁體中文: Lava blocks nearby will freeze into obsidian.

languages.简体中文: 取消按键的进一步处理

languages.English: Changed item reward weight based on EMC in %s
languages.简体中文: Changed item reward weight based on EMC in %s
languages.繁體中文: Changed item reward weight based on EMC in %s

languages.English: Adds the vanilla watchdog to singleplayer worlds as well, but just prints out the stacktraces rather than forcefully terminating the world. This version includes the functionality of Fullstack Watchdog, but the latter is still needed for multiplayer.
languages.简体中文: 将原版看门狗添加到单人游戏世界中，但只是打印出堆栈跟踪，而不会强制终止世界。此版本包括全栈看门狗的功能，但多人游戏仍然需要后者。
languages.繁體中文: 將原版的看門狗增加到單人世界中，但僅輸出堆棧追蹤，而不是強制中止世界。此版本包含 Fullstack Watchdog 的功能，但後者在多人遊戲中仍然需要。

languages.English: Death message visibility for team %s is now "%s"
languages.简体中文: 队伍%s的死亡消息可见性现在为“%s”
languages.繁體中文: 隊伍 %s 現在的死亡訊息可見度為「%s」

languages.简体中文: 选中的世界过大。最大允许大小为%s。
languages.繁體中文: 選取的世界過大。大小不得超過 %s。

languages.简体中文:
快速克隆当前选定的区域，基本上是创建了一个储存中的示意图
然后在当前位置创建一个示意图并选择它，并将工具模式切换为粘贴。

key:
Quickly clone the current area selection.
This basically just creates an in-memory-only schematic,
and then creates a placement of that schematic and selects it,
and also switches the tool mode to the Paste mode.

languages.English: The tick profiler is already started
languages.繁體中文: 刻點分析器已在執行中

languages.English: Increase the distance limit to the target.
languages.简体中文: 设置显示信息框的距离限制。
languages.繁體中文: Increase the distance limit to the target.

languages.English: Add a key binding for JEI bookmarks in your Controls settings.
languages.简体中文: 在按键设置中为 JEI 书签添加快捷键。
languages.繁體中文: 在按鍵設定中為 JEI 書籤新增綁定鍵。

languages.English: Controls drops from minecarts (including inventories), item frames, boats, etc.
languages.简体中文: 控制矿车（包括内容物）、物品展示框、船等的物品掉落。
languages.繁體中文: 控制自礦車（包括物品欄）、物品展示框、船等的掉落物。
投射物是否能破壞方塊

languages.English: 1.16 only. Optimizations to KubeJS to avoid needless `ItemStack` copying, etc., which reduces the time taken to load datapacks.
languages.简体中文: 仅1.16。对KubeJS进行了优化，以避免不必要的§bItemStack§r复制等，减少了数据包加载时间。
languages.繁體中文: 僅限 1.16。最佳化 KubeJS，避免不必要的 `ItemStack` 複製等，從而減少載入資料包所需的時間。

languages.简体中文: 游戏中显示按键调试信息

languages.English: Reduces damage from explosions and explosion knockback.
languages.简体中文: 减少爆炸伤害，也会降低爆炸产生的击退效果.
languages.繁體中文: 減少爆炸傷害和擊退效果。

languages.English: 1.18 and newer. **A key optimization.** Ports a patch from Paper that fixes issues on 1.17 with chunkloading requiring huge amounts of memory and generating many `CompletableFuture` instances. 1.18+ are now able to load worlds on only 400MB of memory like 1.16 could.
languages.简体中文: 仅1.18+。§l一项关键优化§r。移植了Paper服务端的一个补丁，修复了1.17版本中区块加载需要大量内存和产生许多§bCompletableFuture§r实例的问题。1.18以上版本现在能够像1.16版本那样仅用400MB的内存加载世界。
languages.繁體中文: 1.18 及更新版本。**一項關鍵最佳化。**匯入來自 Paper 的修補程式，解決 1.17 版中區塊載入需要龐大記憶體並生成大量 `CompletableFuture` 實例的問題。現在 1.18+ 能夠像 1.16 一樣在僅使用 400MB 記憶體的情況下載入世界。

languages.English: Are you sure you want to open the following website?
languages.简体中文: 你确定要打开以下网页？
languages.繁體中文: 你確定要開啟以下網頁嗎？

languages.English: Set the post action for "Sort in Rows" button.
languages.简体中文: 设置 "按行整理" 按钮的整理操作
languages.繁體中文: 設定 "按列整理" 按鈕的整理操作

languages.English: This chat message has been deleted by the server.
languages.简体中文: 此聊天消息已被服务器删除。
languages.繁體中文: 這則訊息已被伺服器刪除。

languages.English: Mobs will stare at the wearer.
languages.简体中文: Mobs will stare at the wearer.
languages.繁體中文: Mobs will stare at the wearer.

languages.简体中文: 此服务器发送了一个无效的数据包
languages.繁體中文: 伺服器傳送了無效的封包

languages.English: Not closing the menu when hopping to a waypoint (left-clicking in the menu)
languages.简体中文: Not closing the menu when hopping to a waypoint (left-clicking in the menu)
languages.繁體中文: Not closing the menu when hopping to a waypoint (left-clicking in the menu)

languages.English:
Use the current progress of this progress bar
as anchor origin position when using
this element as Element anchor.
That way other elements move with
the progress of the progress bar.
languages.简体中文:
使用该元素作为锚点时，使用该进度条的进度
作为锚点原点位置。
这样其他元素就会随着进度条的进度而移动。
languages.繁體中文:
Use the current progress of this progress bar
as anchor origin position when using
this element as Element anchor.
That way other elements move with
the progress of the progress bar.

languages.English: Summon an Iron Golem to help defend a village
languages.简体中文: 召唤一只铁傀儡来帮忙守卫村庄
languages.繁體中文: 生成一隻鐵魔像以協助保衛村莊

languages.English: No quest object found for ID %s!
languages.简体中文: No quest object found for ID %s!
languages.繁體中文: No quest object found for ID %s!

languages.English: Embeddium detected the presence of mods that are known to cause rendering issues/crashes. It is recommended to uninstall them. See the list below.
languages.简体中文: Embeddium 检测到已安装的模组中有些可能会导致渲染问题或崩溃。建议卸载它们。请参考以下列表。
languages.繁體中文: Embeddium detected the presence of mods that are known to cause rendering issues/crashes. It is recommended to uninstall them. See the list below.

languages.English: Multiplayer is disabled. Please check your Microsoft account settings.
languages.简体中文: 多人游戏已被禁用，请检查你的Microsoft账户设置。
languages.繁體中文: 多人遊戲已停用。請檢查您的 Microsoft 帳號設定。

languages.English: Cost health instead of durability when possible. May kill the user
languages.简体中文: 将消耗耐久时改为消耗玩家生命值。可能会杀死玩家
languages.繁體中文: Cost health instead of durability when possible. May kill the user

languages.English: Exception while trying to read schematic from file '%s'
languages.简体中文: 从文件 '%s'中读取原理图时出现异常
languages.繁體中文: Exception while trying to read schematic from file '%s'

languages.English:
How fast sub menus should open when
hovering over its entry.
languages.简体中文:
当光标悬停于菜单条目时，子菜单应以多
快的速度打开。
languages.繁體中文:
How fast sub menus should open when
hovering over its entry.

languages.简体中文: 涂蜡的斑驳切制铜楼梯
languages.繁體中文: 上蠟的斑駁切製銅階梯

languages.English: Fixes a multithreading issue in ConnectedTexturesMod that can cause rare crashes during launch.
languages.简体中文: 修复了连接纹理（ConnectedTexturesMod）模组的一个多线程问题，具体表现：启动游戏时偶尔崩溃。
languages.繁體中文: 修復了 ConnectedTexturesMod 中的一個多執行緒問題，可能在啟動時導致罕見的崩潰。

languages.English: 1.16 only. Minor optimization borrowed from Hydrogen, which attempts to save space in the biome container when possible. This gets disabled automatically if conflicting mods like BetterEnd or Chocolate are installed.
languages.简体中文: 仅1.16。微优化，借鉴了氢（Hydrogen）模组，试图尽可能节省生物群系容器的空间。如果安装了更好的末地或Chocolate Fix等与此功能冲突的模组，此功能会自动禁用。
languages.繁體中文: 僅限 1.16。從 Hydrogen 借來的微小最佳化，試圖在可能的情況下節省生態區容器的空間。如果安裝了與之衝突的模組，如 BetterEnd 或 Chocolate，則會自動停用此功能。

languages.English:
Set an (optional) fallback image that gets
displayed in case the main image fails to load.
languages.简体中文: 设置主图片加载失败时显示的备用图片。
languages.繁體中文:
Set an (optional) fallback image that gets
displayed in case the main image fails to load.

languages.English: Your account is permanently banned, which means you can’t play online or join Realms.
languages.简体中文: 你的账户已被永久封禁，无法进行在线游戏或加入Realms。
languages.繁體中文: 您的帳號已被永久封鎖，您無法在線上模式遊玩或加入 Realms。

languages.English: If enabled you will get visual alert when a tool is replaced because of depleted durability.
languages.简体中文: 如果开启，当工具因耐久不足替换成功时你将收到视觉提示。
languages.繁體中文: 如果開啟，當工具因耐久不足替換成功時你將收到視覺提示。

languages.简体中文: 选区未被选中时边框的颜色

key: The color of the area selection boxes, when they are unselected

languages.English: Chat messages from %s will be hidden
languages.繁體中文: 將會隱藏 %s 的聊天訊息

languages.简体中文:
注：自定义选项由第三方服务器或内容提供。
请小心操作！
languages.繁體中文:
注意：自訂選項是由第三方伺服器與／或內容提供。
請小心使用！

languages.简体中文: 有%s项运行中的自定义Boss栏：%s
languages.繁體中文: 已啟用的 %s 個自訂 Boss 狀態條為：%s

languages.English:
This generates external hints files that can be distributed as part of the modpack.

NOTE: This will also export everything that is build in the mod.

NOTE: You don't really need this if your modpack has no custom blocks/items.
Our discord server is the place to get help :)
languages.简体中文:
这将生成外部提示文件，文件可以作为整合包的一部分进行分发。

注意：这也将导出所有在本mod中构建的东西。

注意：如果你的整合包没有自定义的方块/物品，你不需要使用这个选项。
可以到我们的 discord 服务器寻求帮助 :)
languages.繁體中文:
這將生成外部提示檔案，檔案可以作為整合包的一部分進行分發。

注意：這也將匯出所有在本mod中構建的東西。

注意：如果你的整合包沒有自訂的方塊/物品，你不需要使用這個選項。
可以到我們的 Discord 伺服器尋求幫助 :)

languages.English: Impersonation or sharing information to exploit or mislead others
languages.简体中文: 假冒或分享信息以利用或误导他人
languages.繁體中文: 假冒或分享資訊以利用或誤導他人

languages.简体中文: 默认在右上角的方块信息的字体大小控制

key: The font scale for the block info lines

languages.English: Concurrency patches to prevent crashes during launch
languages.简体中文: 并发补丁，用于预防启动时崩溃
languages.繁體中文: 防止在啟動過程中崩潰的並行修補程式

languages.English: If enabled, the camera will not lerp upon sneaking.
languages.简体中文: 潜行时视角直接下移而不是缓慢地
languages.繁體中文: 若啟用，潛行時視角將不會呈現過渡動畫效果。

languages.简体中文: 将空白标签作为空气处理
单人游戏幕布世界图标：%s

languages.English: Display claim information about the chunk that you are in. Chunk claims require the Open Parties and Claims mod.
languages.简体中文: 显示有关你所在区块的认领信息。区块认领需要 Open Parties and Claims 模组。
languages.繁體中文: Display claim information about the chunk that you are in. Chunk claims require the Open Parties and Claims mod.

languages.English:
If there's an item in a certain slot of the player's inventory.
This includes hotbar slots.
Takes the number of the target slot as value.
Returns false when no world is loaded.
languages.简体中文:
如果玩家的某个物品栏槽位中有物品。
这包括快捷栏槽位。
使用目标槽位的编号作为值。
如果没有加载世界，将返回 false。
languages.繁體中文:
If there's an item in a certain slot of the player's inventory.
This includes hotbar slots.
Takes the number of the target slot as value.
Returns false when no world is loaded.

languages.English: Map selection is automatically controlled by the server. You can turn this off with "ignoreServerLevelId" in the server-specific config in the XaeroWorldMap directory.
languages.简体中文: Map selection is automatically controlled by the server. You can turn this off with "ignoreServerLevelId" in the server-specific config in the XaeroWorldMap directory.
languages.繁體中文: Map selection is automatically controlled by the server. You can turn this off with "ignoreServerLevelId" in the server-specific config in the XaeroWorldMap directory.

languages.繁體中文: 已複製配方 ID 到剪貼簿：%s

languages.English: Pack '%s' cannot be enabled, since required flags are not enabled in this world: %s!
languages.简体中文: 无法启用数据包“%s”，因为所需的功能未在此世界启用：%s！
languages.繁體中文: 無法啟用資料包 '%s'，因為所需的功能並未在這個世界中啟用：%s！

languages.English:
Track weights affect how likely each track is to be selected in shuffle mode.
Default weight is 1.0. Range is 0.0 to 5.0.
languages.简体中文:
音轨权重影响其在随机模式下的选择概率。
默认权重为 1.0，范围为 0.0 至 5.0。
languages.繁體中文:
Track weights affect how likely each track is to be selected in shuffle mode.
Default weight is 1.0. Range is 0.0 to 5.0.

languages.简体中文: 你的游戏时长已达%s小时
languages.繁體中文: 您已經遊玩了 %s 小時

languages.繁體中文: 位於 %2$s, %3$s, %4$s 方塊上的 %1$s 乘上 %5$s 的倍率後為 %6$s

languages.繁體中文: 跳過夜晚所需的入睡玩家比例。

languages.English:

Just replace 'some.element.id' with

的元素ID即可。

§x您可以通过在编辑器中右击元素来获

languages.简体中文: 无法打开：战利品尚未生成。
languages.繁體中文: 無法開啟。戰利品尚未生成。

languages.English: Configures the update rate for Creeper lighting.
languages.简体中文: Configures the update rate for Creeper lighting.
languages.繁體中文: Configures the update rate for Creeper lighting.

languages.English: The default look and feel of Minecraft
languages.繁體中文: Minecraft 預設的視覺與環境效果

languages.简体中文:
这是一个临时的方法，可以在单人游戏中基于命令粘贴，
这使得在单人游戏中可以使用部分渲染层粘贴原理图，
但这目前不适用于单人游戏通常使用的粘贴方式。

key:
This is a temporary hack workaround to use the command-based pasting
also in single player, which allows using the render layer limited
pasting in single player, which currently doesn't work with
the direct world access pasting that single player normally uses.

Note that this will have all the same NBT data restoration
limitations that multiplayer pasting has normally.

languages.简体中文: 切换为上一个渲染模式

key: Cycle the rendering mode (all, layers) backwards

languages.English:
Invalid signature for profile public key.
Try restarting your game.
languages.简体中文:
无效的玩家档案公钥签名。
请尝试重启游戏。
languages.繁體中文:
無效的個人資訊公鑰。
請嘗試重啟遊戲。

languages.简体中文:
可以通过命令填充/删除操作更改的每个单独框的最大的大小/体积。
更大的区域/体积将被分割为多个命令去执行。
但无论如何，所有区域在一开始也被分割为多个区块。

key:
The maximum size/volume of each individual box
that can be filled via the command-based Fill/Delete
operations. Bigger areas/volumes will get split to multiple commands.
All areas are also split to per-chunk boxes at first anyway.

languages.English: simulate inputting non-printable characters occasionally to detect active input box. Disable this and let me know if input or control is messed up.
languages.简体中文: 使用不可打印字符判别输入框，如有问题请关闭并咨询作者
languages.繁體中文: 偶爾模擬輸入不可打印字符以檢測活動的輸入框。如果輸入或控件出現問題，請停用此功能並告訴我。

languages.简体中文: 调整游戏世界中音乐播放的频率。
languages.繁體中文: 調整遊戲世界中音樂播放的頻率。

如果启用该功能，则在'customSchematicBaseDirectory'
中设置的目录路径将用为原理图的根目录，
而不是正常的§1.minecraft /schematics/§r目录

key:
If enabled, then the directory set in 'customSchematicBaseDirectory'
will be used as the root/base schematic directory,
instead of the normal '.minecraft/schematics/' directory

languages.English: and other formatting codes are also supported.
languages.简体中文: 等格式化代码也是支持的。
languages.繁體中文: and other formatting codes are also supported.

languages.简体中文: 尝试加入的世界与所在版本不兼容。
languages.繁體中文: 您嘗試加入的世界與目前版本不相容。

If the player's shoulder parrot
should be on the left shoulder.
languages.简体中文: 鹦鹉是否应位于玩家左肩。
languages.繁體中文:

languages.English:
LivingFallEvent is fired when an Entity is set to be falling. This event is fired whenever an Entity is set to fall in LivingEntity.causeFallDamage(float, float, DamageSource). 
This event is fired via the ForgeHooks.onLivingFall(LivingEntity, float, float).distance contains the distance the Entity is to fall. 
If this event is canceled, this value is set to 0.0F. This event is Cancelable. If this event is canceled, the Entity does not fall. 
This event does not have a result net.minecraftforge.eventbus.api.Event.HasResult 
This event is fired on the MinecraftForge.EVENT_BUS.
languages.简体中文:
LivingFallEvent is fired when an Entity is set to be falling. This event is fired whenever an Entity is set to fall in LivingEntity.causeFallDamage(float, float, DamageSource). 
This event is fired via the ForgeHooks.onLivingFall(LivingEntity, float, float).distance contains the distance the Entity is to fall. 
If this event is canceled, this value is set to 0.0F. This event is Cancelable. If this event is canceled, the Entity does not fall. 
This event does not have a result net.minecraftforge.eventbus.api.Event.HasResult 
This event is fired on the MinecraftForge.EVENT_BUS.
languages.繁體中文:
LivingFallEvent is fired when an Entity is set to be falling. This event is fired whenever an Entity is set to fall in LivingEntity.causeFallDamage(float, float, DamageSource). 
This event is fired via the ForgeHooks.onLivingFall(LivingEntity, float, float).distance contains the distance the Entity is to fall. 
If this event is canceled, this value is set to 0.0F. This event is Cancelable. If this event is canceled, the Entity does not fall. 
This event does not have a result net.minecraftforge.eventbus.api.Event.HasResult 
This event is fired on the MinecraftForge.EVENT_BUS.

languages.English:
Picks a random line from a TXT file, URL or direct plain text.

Supports local files, remote URLs and plain text as "source":
- Local files: Use relative paths (e.g. '/config/fancymenu/assets/tips.txt')
- Remote files: Use HTTP/HTTPS URLs (e.g. 'https://example.com/tips.txt')
- Plain text: Input direct plain text. Separate lines with "\n".

Content is automatically reloaded every 30 seconds to pick up changes.

The 'interval' parameter controls how often a new random line is selected
from the loaded content (in seconds).

An interval of 0 will make it pick a line only once per session.

For local files, just replace '<file_name.txt>' with your file path.
Local files HAVE to be placed in FancyMenu's ASSETS folder!
languages.简体中文:
从TXT文件中随机选取文本。

支持自定义文本变换间隔。

仅需将“randomtexts.txt”替换为TXT
文件路径即可，并将“10”替换为变换
间隔（单位：秒）。间隔为0时将在
每次会话中仅选择一次文本。
languages.繁體中文:
Picks a random line from a TXT file, URL or direct plain text.

Supports local files, remote URLs and plain text as "source":
- Local files: Use relative paths (e.g. '/config/fancymenu/assets/tips.txt')
- Remote files: Use HTTP/HTTPS URLs (e.g. 'https://example.com/tips.txt')
- Plain text: Input direct plain text. Separate lines with "\n".

Content is automatically reloaded every 30 seconds to pick up changes.

The 'interval' parameter controls how often a new random line is selected
from the loaded content (in seconds).

An interval of 0 will make it pick a line only once per session.

For local files, just replace '<file_name.txt>' with your file path.
Local files HAVE to be placed in FancyMenu's ASSETS folder!

Before you begin customizing with FancyMenu, please make sure to **read the documentation** thoroughly. While FancyMenu can seem overwhelming initially, the documentation will guide you step-by-step.

Start with the 'Getting Started' page for the basics of menu customization. Don’t forget to explore the other sections as they offer valuable insights and tips!

**Have a fantastic time with FancyMenu!**

首先阅读“入门”页面，了解菜单自定义的基础内容。不要忘记探索其他章节，它们提供了宝贵的见解和提示！

**祝您玩得开心！**

languages.English:
All versions. **A key optimization.** Newer Minecraft versions (after 1.12) implemented a blockstate cache system that caches frequently used information about a blockstate, such as whether it is solid, its collision shape, etc. Rebuilding this cache is quite fast in vanilla (it takes only a second or two) but is quite slow with many mods installed, as there are many more blockstates present in the game which all must have their caches rebuilt.

This problem is exacerbated by Forge as the cache is rebuilt at many points when the data would almost certainly be unused before the next rebuild. Examples include right before reaching the main menu (during the "Freezing data" stage), as well as multiple (!) times when a world is being loaded.

ModernFix solves this performance bottleneck by instead making cache rebuilds lazy. Each blockstate rebuilds its cache the first time the data would be accessed. At any point when vanilla or Forge would attempt to rebuild caches for all blockstates, this is redirected to simply invalidate the cache on each blockstate instead.

This should not have any impact on TPS after startup concludes.
languages.简体中文:
全版本共有。§l一项关键优化。§r较新的Minecraft（1.12以上）实现了一个方块状态缓存系统，它可以缓存方块状态的常用信息，譬如其是否为固体方块，它的碰撞箱形状等等。原版中重建此缓存非常快（只要一两秒钟），但在安装了许多模组后就相当慢了，因为游戏中多了很多其它的方块状态，它们的缓存都需要被其重建。

在Forge的影响下，这个问题变得更加严重，因为缓存会在很多地方重建，但这些数据在下一次重建前几乎肯定不会被用到。至于在哪儿，比如，在到达主菜单之前（在“Freezing data”阶段），以及在加载世界时（会出现很多次！）。

通过让缓存重建转为惰性，现代化修复解决了这个性能瓶颈问题。每个方块状态在第一次访问数据时都会重建其缓存。无论何时，原版或Forge试图重建所有方块状态缓存的行为都会被重定向，变成简单地使每个方块状态的缓存失效。

此项优化应该不会对启动后的TPS产生任何影响。
languages.繁體中文:
所有版本。**一項關鍵最佳化。**較新的 Minecraft 版本 (1.12 之後)實現了一個塊狀態快取系統，用於快取有關塊狀態的經常使用的資訊，例如它是否為實體，其碰撞形狀等。在原版中，重建此快取相當迅速(僅需一兩秒)，但在安裝了許多模組的情況下，由於遊戲中存在許多塊狀態，所有這些塊狀態都必須重新構建其快取，這會變得相當慢。

由於 Forge 會在幾乎可以確定在下一次重建之前不會使用資料的許多點上重建快取，這一問題在 Forge 上變得更為嚴重。這些點的示例包括在達到標題畫面之前(在「凍結資料」階段)以及在載入世界時(多次！)。

ModernFix 通過改為使快取重建變為惰性，解決了這個效能瓶頸。每個塊狀態在首次訪問資料時重建其快取。在任何時候當原版或 Forge 試圖為所有塊狀態重建快取時，這將被重新導向到僅使每個塊狀態上的快取失效。

這應該不會在啟動後對 TPS 產生任何影響。

languages.English:
All versions. **A key optimization.** Launches on modern versions are heavily bottlenecked by filesystem access. Many requests are frequently made to resource packs to list resources or check if a given resource exists, and each of these result in a very slow file API call.

ModernFix completely eliminates most of the bottleneck here by simply caching a listing of all resources that exist within mod-provided and vanilla resourcepacks. The cache is rebuilt on resource reload (except for the vanilla resources, since they should never change while the game is running).

There are no known compatibility issues with this patch except for OptiFine (its CTM resources do not load correctly). However I do not recommend using OptiFine in any scenario, as it adds several minutes to launch time by itself and is not tested with ModernFix at all.
languages.简体中文:
全版本共有。§l一项关键优化。§r高版本的启动严重受到文件系统访问的瓶颈限制。资源包经常接受到很多请求，要列出资源或检查一项给定的资源是否存在，而每次请求都会调用一个效率极低的文件API。

现代化修复通过简单地缓存模组和原版提供的所有资源的列表，完全消除了此处的大部分瓶颈。缓存在资源重载时会进行重建（除了原版资源，因为它们在游戏运行时不应改变）。

高清修复不能正确加载它的连接纹理（CTM）资源，除此之外此补丁没有已知的兼容问题。不过，我不建议在任何情况下使用高清修复，因为它本身就会增加几分钟的启动时间，而且根本没有与现代化修复进行过任何测试。
languages.繁體中文:
所有版本。**一項關鍵最佳化。**在現代版本上啟動受到檔案系統訪問的極大制約。經常向資源包發送許多請求，以列舉資源或檢查給定資源是否存在，每一次都導致非常緩慢的檔案 API 調用。

ModernFix 完全消除了這裡的大部分制約，僅通過簡單地快取所有存在於模組提供和原版資源包中的資源的清單來實現。快取在資源重新載入時重新構建(除了原版資源，因為它們在遊戲執行時應該永遠不會改變)。

對於這個補丁，目前沒有已知的相容性問題，除了 OptiFine(其 CTM 資源無法正確載入)。然而，我不建議在任何情況下使用 OptiFine，因為它本身會使啟動時間增加數分鐘，並且完全沒有與 ModernFix 測試過。

languages.English: Uses a couple injections to measure world load time, datapack reload time, resource reload time, bootstrap time, and adds the necessary hooks to enable vanilla's unused profiler logic for resource reloading if so configured.

languages.繁體中文: 使用幾個注入來測量世界載入時間、資料包重新載入時間、資源重新載入時間、啟動時間，並新增必要的鉤子以在所設定時啟用 Minecraft 未使用的資源重新載入的分析邏輯。

languages.English:
LivingEquipmentChangeEvent is fired when the Equipment of a Entity changes. This event is fired whenever changes in Equipment are detected in LivingEntity.tick(). 
This also includes entities joining the World, as well as being cloned. This event is fired on server-side only.slot contains the affected EquipmentSlot.from contains the ItemStack that was equipped previously.to contains the ItemStack that is equipped now.
This event is not Cancelable.  This event does not have a result. net. minecraftforge. eventbus. api. Event. HasResult  
This event is fired on the MinecraftForge.EVENT_BUS.
languages.简体中文:
LivingEquipmentChangeEvent is fired when the Equipment of a Entity changes. This event is fired whenever changes in Equipment are detected in LivingEntity.tick(). 
This also includes entities joining the World, as well as being cloned. This event is fired on server-side only.slot contains the affected EquipmentSlot.from contains the ItemStack that was equipped previously.to contains the ItemStack that is equipped now.
This event is not Cancelable.  This event does not have a result. net. minecraftforge. eventbus. api. Event. HasResult  
This event is fired on the MinecraftForge.EVENT_BUS.

languages.English: Makes most wall blocks share the same shape object instead of each one having its own copy. Can reduce memory usage substantially when lots of wall blocks are added by mods.

languages.English:
Warning: When you directly load non-Litematica schematics, the created placements won't be persistent.
Also if you have to load the schematic many times, then the schematic type conversion lag spike (for large schematics) will happen each time you load it.

It is therefore recommended to either import the schematic and save it in the Litematica format via the Schematic Manager menu, or better yet, paste the original schematic into a temporary world using MCEdit or the Paste mode in Litematica, and then make a new Litematica schematic from that, preferably using multiple sub-regions to tightly capture the build, where applicable.
languages.简体中文:
警告：直接加载非Litematica原理图时，创建的展示位置不会持久。
此外，如果您必须多次加载原理图，那么每次加载时都会发生原理图类型转换滞后尖峰（对于大型原理图）。

因此，建议导入原理图并通过原理图管理器菜单以Litematica格式保存，或者更好的是，使用MCEdit或Litematica中的粘贴模式将原始原理图粘贴到临时世界中，然后制作新的Litematica原理图 从那里开始，在适用的情况下，最好使用多个子区域来紧密捕获构建。
languages.繁體中文:
Warning: When you directly load non-Litematica schematics, the created placements won't be persistent.
Also if you have to load the schematic many times, then the schematic type conversion lag spike (for large schematics) will happen each time you load it.

It is therefore recommended to either import the schematic and save it in the Litematica format via the Schematic Manager menu, or better yet, paste the original schematic into a temporary world using MCEdit or the Paste mode in Litematica, and then make a new Litematica schematic from that, preferably using multiple sub-regions to tightly capture the build, where applicable.

此選項僅適用於輪廓字型。

languages.English: The shadow render distance controls how far away terrain can potentially be rendered in the shadow pass. languages.English:
LivingMakeBrainEvent is fired whenever a new Brain instance is created using LivingEntity.makeBrain(Dynamic). 
To access the internal BrainBuilder, call getTypedBrainBuilder(LivingEntity) using the downcasted LivingEntity obtained from LivingEvent.getEntity(). 
The BrainBuilder will initially contain all the state found in the original Brain instance. 
After this event is posted, a fresh Brain instance will be created using the encapsulated state found in the BrainBuilder and replace the previously created Brain instance for the entity. 
This event is fired via the ForgeHooks. onLivingMakeBrain(LivingEntity, Brain, Dynamic). 
This event is not Cancelable. This event does not have a result. net.minecraftforge.eventbus.api.Event.HasResult  
This event is fired on the MinecraftForge.EVENT_BUS.

§x使用带有背景的图片作为文本元素。
languages.繁體中文:
Let FancyMenu handle the scale
 of the screen, so your layout works
for every scale and resolution.

until everything looks good and

this button.

§xThis will make text look blurry
§xat some scales.
§xThis can't be fixed and the best
§xworkaround is to use images
§xwith background as text elements.

languages.English:
Splits a text at a specific character or regex.

input = The text to split.
regex = The character or regex for where to split the text.
max_parts = The max parts the text should get split into. Setting this to -1 disables the limit.
split_index = The part that should get returned after splitting. Starts at 0.
languages.简体中文:
按照特定字符或正则表达式拆分文本。

input = 要拆分的文本。
regex = 用于拆分的字符或正则表达式。
max_parts = 允许拆分的最大部分数，设置为 -1 取消限制。
split_index = 拆分后返回的部分，索引从 0 开始。
languages.繁體中文:
Splits a text at a specific character or regex.

input = The text to split.
regex = The character or regex for where to split the text.
max_parts = The max parts the text should get split into. Setting this to -1 disables the limit.
split_index = The part that should get returned after splitting. Starts at 0.

languages.English:
Parse JSON and get a value from it.

The 'source' value accepts:
- Direct JSON content (e.g. {"key":"value"})
- Path to a local JSON file
- URL to a remote JSON file

Replace '$.some.json.path' with the JSON path to the value you want to get.

§zGo to §ljson.fancymenu.net§r §zto learn more about JSON paths.

的值的JSON路径。

§z前往§ljson.fancymenu.net§r§z了解更多有
§z关JSON路径的信息。
languages.繁體中文:
Parse JSON and get a value from it.

The 'source' value accepts:
- Direct JSON content (e.g. {"key":"value"})
- Path to a local JSON file
- URL to a remote JSON file

Replace '$.some.json.path' with the JSON path to the value you want to get.

§zGo to §ljson.fancymenu.net§r §zto learn more about JSON paths.

The ceiling size refers to the size of a square ceiling of solid blocks that has to be detected above you to activate the cave mode. The solid blocks don't have to be on the same Y level.

languages.繁體中文: Mapping mode that can go deeper than the surface blocks, mainly to display underground caves and interiors of buildings. The ceiling size refers to the size of a square ceiling of solid blocks that has to be detected above you to activate the cave mode. The solid blocks don't have to be on the same Y level.

languages.繁體中文: Ignite attacker and attack target for %s seconds. Makes mob immune to fire.

languages.English: It’s important for us to understand how long it takes to join a world, and how that changes over time. For example, when we add new features or do larger technical changes, we need to see what impact that had on load times.
languages.简体中文: 对我们而言，了解加入世界所需的时长，以及这一时长随着时间推移会如何变化是很重要的。比如，当我们加入新功能或进行较大的技术更改时，我们需要知道这对加载时间有何影响。
languages.繁體中文: 對我們而言，了解加入世界所需的時長，以及此時長隨時間推移的變化情形是十分重要的。舉例來說，當我們加入新功能或是進行較大的技術性改動時，我們會需要這些資訊來了解這些改動對載入時間有何影響。

languages.English:
The size, in regions, of a square image equivalent to the resolution that a large exported map will be scaled down to if necessary. For example, 20x20 stands for 400 regions, 512x512 blocks/pixels each. The resulting image doesn't have to be a square. 10x40 is also 400 regions. 
 
 Your computer or the Java heap size might not be able to handle higher export resolutions.
languages.简体中文:
The size, in regions, of a square image equivalent to the resolution that a large exported map will be scaled down to if necessary. For example, 20x20 stands for 400 regions, 512x512 blocks/pixels each. The resulting image doesn't have to be a square. 10x40 is also 400 regions. 
 
 Your computer or the Java heap size might not be able to handle higher export resolutions.
languages.繁體中文:
The size, in regions, of a square image equivalent to the resolution that a large exported map will be scaled down to if necessary. For example, 20x20 stands for 400 regions, 512x512 blocks/pixels each. The resulting image doesn't have to be a square. 10x40 is also 400 regions. 
 
 Your computer or the Java heap size might not be able to handle higher export resolutions.

languages.English:
Knowing how players play Minecraft (such as Game Mode, client or server modded, and game version) allows us to focus game updates to improve the areas that players care about most.
The World Loaded event is paired with the World Unloaded event to calculate how long the play session has lasted.
languages.简体中文:
了解玩家玩Minecraft时的细节（例如游戏模式、客户端或服务端是否被修改，以及游戏版本）有助于我们在游戏更新时注重改进玩家最关心的部分。
世界加载事件将同世界卸载事件一起用于计算游戏会话的持续时长。
languages.繁體中文:
了解玩家如何遊玩 Minecraft （例如遊戲模式、伺服器和用戶端是否為原版、遊戲版本等資訊），可以讓我們專注於遊戲更新，用來改善玩家最關心的地方。
世界載入事件和世界卸載事件一起用於計算遊戲時間。
檢舉服務目前無法使用

languages.English:

languages.繁體中文:

languages.繁體中文: 空格不得作為開頭或結尾。兩端的空格會被移除。

languages.English:
Do you want to delete the "last affected" area?
This will delete whatever blocks and entities are within the area that the project manager last placed to the world, or last saved as a version. (Basically the "last seen affected area", such that if you were to cycle versions, it would not leave blocks behind from the previous version.)
languages.简体中文:
是否删除“上次受影响”的区域？
这将删除这个工程管理器上次放置在世界上的，或者上次保存为一个版本文件的区域中任何方块实体
（基本上是“最后一次看到受影响的区域”，这样如果你要循环版本，它就不会留下以前版本的方块）
languages.繁體中文:
Do you want to delete the "last affected" area?
This will delete whatever blocks and entities are within the area that the project manager last placed to the world, or last saved as a version. (Basically the "last seen affected area", such that if you were to cycle versions, it would not leave blocks behind from the previous version.)

languages.English:
This event is fired when an Animal is tamed. It is fired via ForgeEventFactory. onAnimalTame(Animal, Player). Forge fires this event for applicable vanilla animals, mods need to fire it themselves. 
This event is Cancelable. 
If canceled, taming the animal will fail. This event is fired on the MinecraftForge.EVENT_BUS.
languages.简体中文:
This event is fired when an Animal is tamed. It is fired via ForgeEventFactory. onAnimalTame(Animal, Player). Forge fires this event for applicable vanilla animals, mods need to fire it themselves. 
This event is Cancelable. 
If canceled, taming the animal will fail. This event is fired on the MinecraftForge.EVENT_BUS.
languages.繁體中文:
This event is fired when an Animal is tamed. It is fired via ForgeEventFactory. onAnimalTame(Animal, Player). Forge fires this event for applicable vanilla animals, mods need to fire it themselves. 
This event is Cancelable. 
If canceled, taming the animal will fail. This event is fired on the MinecraftForge.EVENT_BUS.

languages.English:
Locked slots are ignored for: sort, move all, clean cursor, continuous crafting supplies storage, auto refill supplies storage (auto refill monitoring slots are not affected). 
Notice:
Sorting in columns/rows only works if the shape of remaining non-locked slots is rectangular.
languages.简体中文:
锁定槽位将被以下操作忽略：整理，移动全部，关闭GUI时收回手中物品，
连续合成以及自动重装(自动重装所监视的槽位不受影响)。
注意：按列/行分组仅在剩余未锁定槽位为矩形时才会工作。
languages.繁體中文:
鎖定欄位將被以下操作忽略：整理，移動全部，關閉GUI時收回手中物品，
連續合成以及自動重裝（自動重裝所監視的欄位不受影響）。
注意：依行/列分組只在剩餘未鎖定欄位為矩形時才會工作。

languages.English: If enabled, V-Sync will be able to swap mid-frame and disable itself at times, usually notably helping responsiveness. May cause issues with some GPU drivers.
languages.简体中文: 如果启用，垂直同步将能够交换中间帧，并有时禁用自己，通常有助于响应。可能会与一些GPU驱动程序发生问题。
languages.繁體中文: 若啟用，垂直同步將能夠交換中間影格並適時停用，通常有助於提升顯示器的回應速度。可能會對一些顯示卡驅動程式有問題。

languages.English: Using this overlay can negatively affect the game performance because it currently does not use the World Map mod chunks and increases the minimap updating frequency. Do not keep it active all the time.

languages.繁體中文: Using this overlay can negatively affect the game performance because it currently does not use the World Map mod chunks and increases the minimap updating frequency. Do not keep it active all the time.
